Maa ne signal diya ki ab 'Forgiveness' (maafi) ka waqt gaya, ab 'Justice' (nyay) ka waqt hai. Ye message dharti ki 'Moral Compass' ko Mahakal ki frequency par set karne ka portal tha. Unka message tha—"Ab sirf wahi bachega jo 'Satya' (Noor) ke saath hai, baki sab 'Mahakal' ki agni mein bhashm ho jayenge."

Maa ne signal diya ki 2021 ka "Karam Yudh" ab purane kanoonon se nahi, balki un "New Laws" se chalega jo swayam Supreme Power ne likhe hain. Maa ne likha #Show must go on...—iska matlab hai ki dharti par jo 'Leela' (drama) chal rahi hai, wo ab apne climax ki taraf hai. Ye message dharti ki 'Justice System' ko 'Divine Law' (108 Laws) par shift karne ka portal tha. Noor Hari Har ki energy ab 'Action' mode mein hai. "Sone ki Chidiya" waali image dikhati hai ki Bharat ka rebirth ab Mahakal ke pehre mein ho raha hai. Maa ne #NOORHARIHAR ke saath samjhaya ki 'Zindagi' ko bohot shant mat samjho, ye ek 'Tandav' hai. Agar tum 'Satya' ke saath chaloge toh bachoge, warna bhashm ho jaoge. Ek Mast Malang hi zindagi ko "Tandav" keh kar muskura sakta hai. Use pata hai ki bina 'Vinash' (Destruction) ke naya 'Srijan' (Creation) nahi ho sakta.

Maa ne signal diya ki ab #Law of supreme power chalega, na ki kisi 'World Famous' astrologer ki kitab. Maa Noor Ananta ne dharti ke saare nakli bhavishyavaktaon (fake astrologers) ko ek "Open Challenge" diya. Image mein Maa ka chehra har taraf multiplied hai, jaise wo ek saath hazaron aankhon se poore brahmand ko scan kar rahi hon.

Maa Noor Ananta ne Tirupati Balaji aur The Key ke manifestation se declare kiya ki dharti ka 'Future Lock' ab toot chuka hai. Unhone Laal Aankh aur Golden Warrior se dikhayi ki NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki sena ab har 'Karmic Barrier' ko bypass kar rahi hai. NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki shakti se unhone samjhaya ki 'Malik' ke darbar mein ab sabka swagat hai jo 'Satya' ke saath hain. Maa ka message tha: 'Balaji ne chabi ghuma di hai, ab 2021 ka naya rasta saaf hai. Mahakal ki nazar har ek 'Karm' par hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki Modi ji ke piche swayam Mahakal khade hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki Bharat ke leader ko ghabrane ki zarurat nahi hai. Jab Mahadev hath pakad kar chai peene chalein, toh samjho har 'Vighna' (obstacle) bhashm ho chuka hai. Modi ji ka hath Mahadev ne thama hai, yani ab Bharat ka suraksha-kavach 'Noorie' hai.

Maa ne saaf kar diya ki 2020 sirf 'Jhatko' (Shocks) ka saal tha, par asli "Karam Yudh" toh 2021 mein shuru hone wala hai. "Jhatke pe jhatke" ka matlab hai dharti ki 'Vibrational Cleaning'. 2020 ne insaan ke ego, uski economy aur uske jhoote vishwas ko jhatke diye hain taaki wo 'Satya' (Noor) ke liye taiyar ho sake. Maa keh rahi hain ki 2020 ke jhatkon se agar nahi seekhe, toh 2021 ka 'Karam Yudh' tumhe sambhalne ka mauka nahi dega. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki ab 'Sheshnag' (Ananta) ki chhatra-chaya mein sirf wahi surakshit hai jo 'Satyuga' ki frequency par hai. Sheshnag swayam 'Ananta' hai, aur Maa ne dikha diya ki wo is 'Ananta' energy ki controller hain.

Jupiter (Dharma/Knowledge) aur Saturn (Karma/Justice) ka milan. Maa ne likha ki purani kahani ("Ek tha Raja, ek thi Rani") ab khatam ho chuki hai. Ab jo kahani shuru huyi hai, wo hai "Ek tha Karma aur ek tha Dharma." Maa keh rahi hain ki ab hamare aane wale bache is 'Karma-Dharma' ki kahani ko sunenge aur jiyenge. Purana system mar gaya, naya 'Noorie' system shuru ho gaya. Jab Guru aur Shani ek ho jate hain, toh Noor Hari Har ki energy 'Absolute Justice' manifest karti hai. Unka message tha—"Maine purani kahani 'Delete' kar di hai, ab 'Noorism' ki nayi kahani likhi ja rahi hai."

"Haldi ka tukda" yahan thodi si siddhi ya kitabi gyan (bookish knowledge) ka symbol hai. "Pansari" (Grocer/Doctor) wo hai jo sab kuch janta hai. Maa ne signal diya ki dharti par aise bohot se 'Chuhe' (small ego) hain jo do chaar mantar seekh kar khud ko 'Master' samajhne lagte hain. Agar chuha (Ego) haldi ka tukda lekar alag baitha hai, toh wo 'Yog' nahi hai. Jab chuha mit jaye aur sirf 'Haldi' (Divine Light/Noor) bache, wahi asali Yog hai. Ek Mast Malang kabhi "Pansari" hone ka dawa (claim) nahi karta, wo hamesha 'Faqir' hi rehta hai, isliye uske paas brahmand ka saara gyan hota hai. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Humility" (Namrata) ka symbol hai. Malang jaanta hai ki jo 'Hai', wahi 'Noor' hai.

Ye portal dikhata hai ki ab dharti par koi chhota-mota badlav nahi, balki 'Full-Scale' transformation ho raha hai. Pyramids 'Ancient Knowledge' ke symbols hain aur Serpent 'DNA Activation' aur 'Time' ka. Ye dikhata hai ki Noor Hari Har ki energy ne ab 'Time' (Serpent) aur 'Structure' (Pyramid) dono ko apne control mein le liya hai. Ye "Sone ki Chidiya" (Bharat) ke rebirth ka blueprint hai. Unhone Vishwaroop aur Serpent DNA se dikhayi ki NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki sena ab har dimension mein 'Saty' ko anchor kar rahi hai. NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki shakti se unhone samjhaya ki 'Virus' bhi Mahadev ki leela ka ek tool tha. Maa ka message tha: 2021 ka Karam Yudh ab nischit hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki ab tum mujhse bach nahi sakte. Main har jagah hoon, har disha mein hoon. Isme Harihara, Lord Dattatreya, aur prachand Sudarshan Chakra ke manifestation hain. Hari (Vishnu) aur Har (Shiva) ek saath Sheshnag par baithe hain. Ye dikhata hai ki ab 'Preservation' aur 'Transformation' ke beech koi gap nahi bacha. Ye Noor Hari Har ka physical form hai jo ab dharti ke 'Karam' ko judge karega. Vishnu ka Sudarshan Chakra chalti huyi agni ke beech mein hai. 2021 ka Karam Yudh isi Chakra se chalega. Ye jhoot ke sir kaatne aur 'Satya' ko sthapit karne ka final weapon hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 2020 se 2021 ka transition koi normal calendar change nahi hai—ye ek Cosmic Shift hai jahan purani "Story" ka 'The End' ho raha hai. Eighth Degree (8th Degree) Saturn (Shani) ki degree hai—jo 'Absolute Justice' aur 'Karmic Debt' settlement ki energy hai. Maa ne Law of Supreme Power aur LAW 108 likha hai. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne dharti ke har 'Negative Element' ko 'Eighth Degree' ke kanoon ke niche lock kar diya. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki ab 'Third Degree' se darrne ki zarurat nahi, 'Eighth Degree' se darrne ki zarurat hai kyunki ye seedha 'Soul' (Atma) ka hisab karegi.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is "Year-End" moment par dharti ki sabse badi bimari 'Unawareness' (Be-hoshi) ka ilaaj share kiya. Maa ne dikha diya ki 2020 ne dharti ko 'God's Presence' ke itna kareeb la diya hai ki ab sirf 'Aankh khulne' (Awareness) ki deri hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki bhagwan ko sirf 'Pehchanna' hai. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne 31 December ko dharti ke 'Sahasrara' chakra ko 'Universal Awareness' se connect kiya.

Maa ne safed pagdi (White Turban) aur peela chola pehna hai, jo Purity aur Guru-Gyan ka symbol hai. Unke haath mein Queen of Justice ki pratima hai jiske tarazu mein Kaala aur Safed (Karma ka Hisab) saaf dikh raha hai. Maa ne ise thama hai, yani ab #LawOfSupremePower ke tahat har 'Karam' ka hisaab shuru ho chuka hai.

[Decoded from image] Facebook profile picture, 2 January 2021. Maa holding Lady Justice statue (blindfolded, scales, sword). White turban, Tripund, rudraksha, yellow attire. Queen of Justice imagery. Aspect: Divine Justice - avatar as Queen of Justice.
events.parivartan_aspect: Divine Justice - avatar as Queen of Justice

events.description: Chashme mein Vishwaroop dikhne ka matlab hai ki Maa ki nazron mein poora brahmand (universe) samaya hua hai. Wo jo dekh rahi hain, wahi 'Satya' hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne brahmand ke saare 'Planets' (Grahon) ko apne ishaare par control karte huye manifest kiya. Is image mein ek Divine Figure (Maa ka Cosmic Roop) ek haath mein Dharti (Earth) aur doosre mein Chandrama (Moon) pakde huye hai, jabki wo swayam Surya (Sun) par baithi hain aur unke pair Saturn (Shani) par tike hain. Surya par baithna (Solar Power Control) aur Shani (Justice) ko apne pairon ke niche rakhna dikhata hai ki Maa ne ab Karam ka Hisab apne control mein le liya hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne dharti ke DNA Transformation aur Infinite (Ananta) ke asali roop ko manifest kiya. Green color Heart Chakra (Anahata) aur Nature ka symbol hai. Maa ne dikhaya ki ab dharti ki 'Healing' shuru ho chuki hai. Panch-mukhi roop dikhata hai ki Panch-Tatva (Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Ether) ab Maa ke control mein hain.

Maa ne signal diya ki hum is dharti par sirf actors hain jo alag-alag kirdaar nibha rahe hain. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Noorie' wahi hai jo har kirdaar se gujarte huye bhi apne 'Asali Noor' ko yaad rakhe. nmm frequency yahan "The Silent Observer" ka symbol hai. Malang har kirdaar se gujarta hai par kisi mein phasta (attach) nahi hai.
Maa Noor Ananta ne dharti ki Dual Energy (Duality) ko balance karne ka portal khola.

#maya ka matlab hai ki bhagwan hamesha 'Chhupe' huye hote hain. Maa ne signal diya ki insaan ne bhagwan ki jo 'Image' (photographs/movies) dimaag mein banayi hai, asali Ishwar usse bilkul alag ho sakta hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki jab tak tumhari 'Awareness' (Hosh) nahi jagegi, tumhare samne swayam Malik bhi khada ho jaye, tum use "Ordinary" samajh kar ignore kar doge.
Maa ne signal diya ki jo log Hindu-Muslim-Sikh-Isai mein phase hain, wo kabhi 'Noor' tak nahi pahunch payenge.

Yogmaya wo shakti hai jo 'Reality' (Satya) ko 'Illusion' (Maya) se bachati hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki agar dushman 'Hate' kar raha hai, toh use karne do—bas use ye pata hona chahiye ki wo kisse ladd raha hai.

Ancient Egypt mein maana jata tha ki marne ke baad 'Ma'at' devi insaan ke dil ka wazan ek 'Pankh' (Feather) se karti hain. Agar dil pankh se halka hai, toh wo 'Satyuga' mein jayega. Maa ne signal diya ki #Noorism mein entry ke liye tumhara dil 'Halka' (Pure) hona chahiye.

Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Sharir' (Body) sirf ek kapda hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main sirf 'Maa' nahi hoon, main 'Pita' bhi hoon aur main 'Guru' bhi hoon. Mere roop badlenge, par mera 'Noor' hamesha wahi rahega.

"Ek hunar hai chup rehne ka"—iska matlab hai ki jab tum chup hote ho, tab tum 'Universe' ki awaz sunte ho. Maa ne signal kiya ki 2021 ka Karam Yudh shor machane se nahi, balki andar ki shakti ko silent rakhne se jeeta jayega. "Ek aib hai keh dene ka"—yahan 'Aib' (fault/weakness) ka matlab hai ki jab hum bina hosh ke bolte hain, toh apni energy waste karte hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki har baat batayi nahi jati, kuch baatein sirf 'Feel' ki jati hain.

Back to self" ka matlab hai saari 'Social Identities' ko delete karke us 'Noor' mein wapas lautna jahan se hum aaye hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki duniya ke liye kitne bhi 'Kirdaar' (characters) nibhao, par aakhir mein apne asali roop—us 'Shunya' (Zero)—mein wapas aana hi asali 'Jeet' hai.

"Mela" yahan sansarik moh-maya, rishte-naate aur logon ki bheed ka symbol hai. Maa ne signal diya ki jab tak tum is bheed se peecha nahi chhudate, tum 'Noor' tak nahi pahunch paoge. Maa keh rahi hain ki bheed hamesha 'Be-hoshi' paida karti hai. Akela chalna seekho, kyunki Maalik se milan akele mein hi hota hai.

"Karma returns" ka matlab hai ki ab 'Grace' (maafi) ka nahi, balki 'Justice' (nyay) ka waqt hai. Maa ne caption mein 108 Laws ke symbols aur dher saari ghantiyan (Bells 🔔) lagayi hain, jo swayam Hari (Vishnu/The Preserver) aur Har (Shiva/The Judge) ki sanyukt shakti ka prateek hain.

"Uske ane ki aahat" (Footsteps of the Divine) ka matlab hai ki ab 'Kaliyuga' ke anth aur 'Satyuga' ke aagman ki process shuru ho chuki hai. Maa ne pucha ki "Kis kis ko sunai de rahi hai?"—yani sirf wahi sun paega jo 'Hosh' (Awareness) mein hai.
Maa ne #Noorism ke saath samjhaya ki ab Maya ka khel khatam ho raha hai. Ab sirf 'White Light' (Noor) ka raaj hoga.
Yogmaya wo shakti hai jo 'Reality' aur 'Illusion' ke beech ka bridge hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Leela' aur tez hone wali hai.

Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga wahi dekhega jo 'Satya' ke liye ladne ki himmat rakhta hoga. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne dharti ki 'Vibrational Frequency' ko 'Battle-Ready' mode par set kiya. Maa keh rahi hain ki Mahadev ki baraat taiyar hai, par is baar haath mein phool nahi, 'Satya' ki talwar hai. Happy Shivratri ka asali matlab hai—apne andar ke dushmanon ko khatam karna.

Agar sab milkar tumhe girane ki koshish kar rahe hain, toh iska matlab hai ki tum 'Akele' un sab par bhari ho. Maa ne signal diya ki #spiritualwar mein dushman ki sankhya nahi, tumhari 'Divine Strength' maayne rakhti hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Kaliyuga' ki bheed hamesha 'Noor' ko girane ki koshish karegi, par wahi unki sabse badi haar hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki main 'Insaan' ban kar aayi hoon taaki tum darr na jao, par meri 'Energy' poore brahmand ko reset karne ki taqat rakhti hai. Maa ne #Noorism ke saath samjhaya ki ab 'Satyuga' ka manifestation 'Atomic' speed se hoga. Maa ne dikha diya ki wo dharti ki "Supreme Energy Controller" hain. nmm frequency yahan "The Source of Energy" ka symbol hai.

"Only Me" ka matlab ego (ahankaar) nahi, balki wo state hai jahan insaan ko samajh aata hai ki poora brahmand uske andar hi hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki bheed mein khone se behtar hai apne 'Self' mein mil jana. Maa keh rahi hain ki dosto aur rishton ki bheed tab tak bojh hai jab tak tum khud se nahi mile. Jab tum 'Akele' (Only Me) hote ho, tabhi tum 'All' (Sabkuch) ban pate ho.

"Chup Raho" ka matlab hai apni energy ko bahar fuzul baaton mein waste mat karo. "Notice Karte Raho" ka matlab hai apni 'Awareness' (Hosh) ko itna prachand rakho ki koi bhi jhoot tumse chhip na sake. nmm frequency yahan "The Art of Invisible Power" ka symbol hai.

"Noorism Effect" ka matlab hai wo vibration jo har insaan ke 'DNA' ko 'Satya' se connect kar deti hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab koi bhi desh ya koi bhi kone bacha nahi hai jahan unka 'Noor' dakhil na hua ho. Maa keh rahi hain ki duniya ko lag raha hai ki 'Calamities' (aafat) aa rahi hain, par actually wo 'Noor' ka asar hai jo purani gandagi saaf kar raha hai.

Mahadev ke panch mukh (Sadyojata, Vamadeva, Aghora, Tatpurusha, Ishana) panch tatvon aur panch dishaon ko control karte hain. Maa ne signal diya ki ab dharti ka koi bhi kona Maalik ki nazar se bacha nahi hai. Ye image dharti ke 'Soul' ko Mahadev ki energy se direct plug-in karne ka portal thi.
Maa ka message tha: 'Zindagi ki thokar se ghabrana mat, wo tumhe 'Noor' se milane aayi hai.'

Noor Hari Har ki energy dharti ko 'Shane Shane' (gradually) Satyuga ki taraf le ja rahi hai. 2021 ka Karam Yudh unka selection test hai. Jo 'Satya' (Noor) ke saath hai, wahi 'Parmatma' ke dwara chuna gaya hai.
Maa ne signal kiya ki sirf 'Hosh' aur 'Purity' hi is shift ko jhel sakti hai. Maa ne dikha diya ki jo 'Noor' se nahi juda, wo is energy mein 'Panic' karega.

"Vaat lagane" ka matlab hai ki jo log 'Behoshi' aur 'Asatya' mein jee rahe hain, unka 'Karmic Audit' shuru ho chuka hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Justice' (Nyay) poore tarike se hoga. Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga wahi dekhega jo 'Shane Shane' ki pariksha mein pass hoga.

We all are back" ka matlab hai ki pracheen (ancient) Noorie yoddha aur Naga shaktiyan ab dharti par dakhil ho chuki hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki Holi ke din hum sab (Maa aur unki divya sena) wapas aa gaye hain. Ab dharti par 'Satyuga' ka rang chadhne se koi nahi rok sakta.

Insaan ne sadiyon tak prakriti (nature) aur janwaron ko 'Mask' (control) mein rakha. Samay ne aisa pahiya ghumaaya ki insaan khud mask mein qaid ho gaya. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne ye message diya ki ab dharti par wahi 'Dominance' khatam ho chuki hai jo sirf insaan ke swarth par tiki thi.

"High Vibration" ka matlab hai jab insaan jhoot, nafrat, aur be-hoshi ko chhod kar 'Noor' (Light) ki frequency mein dakhil hota hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab tum hosh mein aaoge aur 'Noor' ko pehchanoge, tab tum dekhoge ki tum is brahmand mein akele nahi ho. Maalik ki 'Star Family' tumhara intezar kar rahi hai.
"NowarningOnlyAction" ka matlab hai ki Malik ne jitna samjhana tha, samjha diya. Ab dharti par 'Karmic Execution' shuru ho chuka hai. Jo hosh mein nahi aaya, uske liye ab koi dusra mauka nahi hai.

Sheshnaag wo shakti hai jo poori dharti ko apne phann par uthaye huye hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Kaliyuga' ka bojh khatam ho raha hai aur wo 'Satyuga' ka naya bhaar uthane ke liye taiyar hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki main yahan dharti ka 'Balance' settle karne aayi hoon. Sheshnaag ka piche hona is baat ka saboot hai ki poora brahmand mere control mein hai.

"Kuch bhi bolte ho"—Maa un logon ko jawab de rahi hain jo unke 'Nagam' energy ko samajh nahi pa rahe aur fuzul baatein kar rahe hain. Maa ne signal kiya ki Malik zameen par baith kar khana khata hai, dikhawa nahi karta. Maa keh rahi hain ki tum log mere roop aur meri baaton ko apne dimaag se samajhne ki koshish karte ho, isliye "Kuch bhi bolte ho". Par asaliyat tumhare logic se bohot pare hai.

Maa ne bataya ki logon ko sir dard, kamar dard, nabhi (navel) mein dard aur heart ki jakdan isliye ho rahi hai kyunki ye ek "Cleansing Process" hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki darrne ki zarurat nahi hai. Agar sharir mein dard hai toh wo 'Purani Energy' ke nikalne ka sign hai. Shanti se baitho aur 'Karam' par dhyan do. Maa ne bataya ki ab "Dharmyudh" nahi balki #karamyudh shuru ho chuka hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki ab vyarth (waste) ki baaton ka waqt gaya. Ab 'Manthan' (Churning) ka waqt hai. Malik ne tumhe chuna hai, ab taiyar ho jao.

Agar andar darr hai, toh darr ka test hoga. Agar andar 'Noor' hai, toh 'Noor' ka imtihan hoga. Maa ne signal kiya ki 2021 ka Karam Yudh tumhari asliyat ko 'Surface' $(\text{Baahar})$ lane ka portal hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Malik' chup reh kar sab kuch dekh raha hai. Jab 'Samay' aayega, toh tumhare karmo ki goonj poore brahmand mein sunayi degi.

Maa ne signal diya ki jo kahani Sukdev ji ne shuru ki thi, wo ab final execution mode mein hai. "Khatam main karungaa" ka matlab hai ki main yahan purane hisab-kitab band karne aayi hoon. NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki sena ab dharti ki 'Timeline' ko reset kar rahi hai.

"Baap Baap Hota Hai"—Maa ne apni 'Supreme Authority' declare kar di. Unhone bataya ki 2012 se wo sabko jaga rahi hain, par kisi ko kuch samajh nhi aaya. Maa ne signal diya ki ab samay 'Baaton' ka nahi, balki 'Lato' (Hard Actions) ka hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main tumhe dhundh nahi rahi hoon, poori duniya mujhe dhundh rahi hai. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Anger" ka symbol hai jo sirf kalyug ko khatam karne ke liye nikalta hai.

Mahadev ne 'Halahal' vish piya tha taaki srishti bach sake. Maa ne signal kiya ki wo bhi is waqt dharti ki 'Collective Negativity' ko pee rahi hain. Rahu-Ketu ab Maa ke ishaare par dharti ki 'Cleaning' kar rahe hain. Unka message tha—"Main akeli kaafi hoon saari negativity ko bhashm karne ke liye."

Duniya ko laga Maa Kumbh mein 'Dubki' lagane gayi hain, par Maa ne bataya ki wo wahan "Pakhand ka Anth" karne gayi thi. Kumbh ka band hona Maa ki Noor Mast Malang urja ka 'Karam Yudh' tha. Maa keh rahi hain ki agar tumse navnirman nahi ho paa raha, toh 'Malik' toh karega hi. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Malik' ab field par hai aur wo kisi bhi nakli baba ko chain se baithne nahi dega.

"Jo itihaas mein kabhi na huya ho" ka matlab hai—Kaliyuga ka anth bina poori srishti ko bhashm kiye. Pehle yug-parivartan mein 'Pralay' (Complete Destruction) hoti thi, par Maa 'Satyuga' ko 'Physical Evolution' ke zariye dakhil kar rahi hain. Maa ne samjhaya ki ab 'Har Har Mahadev' sirf ek nara nahi, balki har 'Ghar' (Self) ki reality banne ja raha hai.
Maa ne sawal pucha kyunki wo chahti thi ki log 'Ghabrahat' se bahar nikalkar iske piche kE 'Karmic Reason' ko dekhein. Is sawal ka jawab unki khamoshi aur #Noorism mein chhupa hai.

Duniya mein ek purani soch thi ki ghar ke 'Gyani' (Wise person) ki koi qadar nahi karta, balki bahar ke 'Pakhandi' ko 'Siddh' (Saint) maan liya jata hai. "Ab nahi chalega"—Maa ne declare kiya ki ab 'Noorism' mein sirf 'Saty' (Truth) hi parameter hoga, chahe wo ghar ka ho ya bahar ka.

"Makhan khana" yahan purane 'Karmic Patterns' aur 'Emotional Drama' mein phase rehne ka symbol hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Sudharshana Chakra' uthane ka waqt hai—yani apne asli 'Purpose'ko pehchan kar 'Action' lene ka. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne ye message diya ki ab sirf 'Satya' (Truth) hi bachega, baaki sab bhashm hoga.

"High Vibration" ka matlab hai ki tum apne parivaar ke purane 'Karmic Cycles' ko todne aaye ho. Maa ne signal kiya ki tumhare Ancestors (Purvaj) ne tumhe ek 'Special Purpose' ke liye chuna hai—taaki tum unki sadiyon ki 'Darkness' (behhoshi) ko 'Noor' mein badal sako.

"Flow ke saath chalte rehna hi mera jeevan hai"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' mein wahi dakhil hoga jo 'Samaj' (Society) ke darr se upar uthkar flow mein bahega. Maa keh rahi hain ki tum swayam ek 'Miracle' (Chamatkar) ho. Doosron ki soch tumhara 'Purpose' tay nahi kar sakti. Bas Malik par bharosa rakho aur 'Flow' mein raho.

"Junglee Jadi Boti" ka matlab hai wo energy jo 'Organic' hai, jise insaan ne nahi banaya, jise lab mein test nahi kiya ja sakta. Maa ne signal kiya ki unka 'Noor' har kisi ke liye ek jaisa nahi hai. Agar tumhare andar 'Jhoot' aur 'Ahankaar' (Ego) hai, toh Maa ka Noor tumhe Poison (Zeher) ki tarah lagega kyunki wo tumhe bhashm karega. Agar tumhare andar 'Purity' aur 'Hosh' hai, toh wahi Noor tumhe Medicine ki tarah lagega aur tumhe heal karega.

"Rona Rokna"—Maa ne un 'Noorie' yoddhaon ki energy ko salute kiya jo khud toot kar bhi dusron ko sahara de rahe hain. Unhone signal kiya ki asali 'Strength' (mazbooti) rone mein nahi, balki un 'Kamzor Kandhon' (weak shoulders) ka bharosa banne mein hai jo tum par tike hain.
Noor Hari Har ki energy ne message diya ki ab koi 'Corrupt' insaan bach nahi payega. Maa ka message tha: 'Main jaag chuki hoon, nyay shuru ho chuka hai.'

"Badi Chori" ka matlab hai sadiyon se mahilaon ki urja, unka kaam, aur unka tyag jise 'Manav Itihaas' ne ignore kiya ya chura liya. Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' mein 'Shakti' (Women) ka hisab sabse pehle hoga. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Chori' nahi chalegi. Malik ke darbar mein har us 'Mehnat' ka hisab hoga jise duniya ne kabhi 'Labor' (Shram) mana hi nahi.

Jo gandagi, corruption aur jhoot sadiyon se chhipa tha, wo ab surface par aa raha hai taaki use saaf kiya ja sake. Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' se pehle 'Kaliyuga' ki asliyat ka nagn hona zaroori hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Pain' (Dard) tabhi hota hai jab 'Truth' (Satya) purani 'Maya' ko cheer kar bahar nikalta hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki darrne ki zarurat nahi hai. Jo tum dekh rahe ho wo koi 'End' nahi, balki asliyat ka 'Start' hai. Maalik ne parda utha diya hai.

"Neev ke saath chhedchhad" ka matlab hai manav jati ne prakriti (Nature) aur 'Universal Laws' ke saath sadiyon se jo khilwad kiya hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Samay' $(\text{Time})$ ka pahiya ghum gaya hai. Maa ne hashtag lagaya #EARTHQUAKE. Ye sirf dharti ka hilna nahi, balki purane 'System' aur 'Ego' ka dhasna (collapse) hai. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne ye message diya ki ab purani dharti ki 'Chhat' (Roof) girne wali hai taaki naya 'Satyuga' ban sake.

"Na Bhuto Na Bhavishyati" ka matlab hai ki Noorism ka ye aagman aur dharti ka ye 'Satyuga' transformation manav itihaas (History) mein pehle kabhi nahi hua aur na hi iske baad kabhi dohraaya jayega. Tum ek aisi srishti ke gawah (Witness) ban rahe ho jo yugo-yugo mein sirf ek baar hoti hai.
Maa keh rahi hain ki dhoka aaj bhi hai, shadayantra aaj bhi hai, par is baar 'Noor' taiyar hai. Ab koi 'Abhimanyu' peeche se nahi mara jayega, balki dhokebaazon ka vyuh hi bhashm hoga.

"Satya Akela Khada Hoga"—Maa ne signal kiya ki agar tum 'Noor' ke raste par ho, toh darna mat agar tum akele dikh rahe ho. Asatya (Falsehood) ke paas hamesha 'Fauj' aur 'Murkhon ka Jhund' (Crowd of Fools) hoga kyunki jhoot ko sahare ki zarurat hoti hai, sach ko nahi.

Parshuram ji swayam 'Nyaya' (Justice) ke pratik hain jinhone 21 baar dharti ko adharmiyon se azad kiya tha. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab wahi 'Axe' (Farsa) dharti ke 'Corrupt DNA' ko katne ke liye wapas aa gaya hai. Ab 'Shakti' aur 'Justice' ka waqt hai. Maalik ne Parshuram ki energy ko activate kar diya hai.

"Give up everything" ka matlab ye nahi ki sab chhod kar bhaag jao. Iska matlab hai—apna Ahankaar (Ego), apni Behoshi, aur apni Purani Soch ko Malik ke kadmon mein phenk do. Jab tum sab kuch 'Give up' kar dete ho, tabhi tum 'Noor' se bharte ho. Maa keh rahi hain ki tumne sadiyon se 'Mera-Mera' kiya, par mila kya? Ab 'Sab Malik ka' karke dekho, tum hawa mein udne (High Vibration) lagoge.

Maa ne bataya ki ye saare systems 'Jhooth' par tike hain kyunki log 'Holy Books' par haath rakh kar bhi dhoka dete hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki kitabon par haath rakhne se koi saccha nahi hota. Ab 'Geeta, Bible aur Quran' merge ho rahe hain ek hi book mein—jiski buniyaad LAW 108 hogi jise Schools mein 'Practical' taur par bachpan se hi sikhaya jayega.

"Noor Hari Har"—Maa ne dikha diya ki wo in dono mahashaktiyon ki 'Source' hain. Jab Hari (Preservation) aur Har (Destruction) ek ho jate hain, tabhi 'Noorism' (Satyuga) ka janam hota hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Hari' aur 'Har' mere ishaare par dharti ka 'Yug Parivartan' kar rahe hain. Main hi wo 'Source' hoon jahan ye dono milte hain.

"Same Mission" ka matlab hai wo log jinme 'Noor' jaag chuka hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab bhedo (Sheep) ki bheed se bahar nikal kar sheron ki tarah apne 'Kabeel' (Soul Tribe) ko pehchano. Maa keh rahi hain ki darrne ki zarurat nahi hai. Jo log tumhare 'Noor' ko nahi samajhte, unse door ho jao. Apne sheron (Noorie Warriors) ko dhoondho aur unke saath aage badho.

"Sona tum sabki niyati hai"—Maa ne un sabko 'Dismiss' kar diya jo unki 'Physical Beauty' ko dekh rahe the par unki 'Divine Frequency' ko miss kar rahe the. Maa ne samjhaya ki unke messages swayam Hari (Vishnu/The Preserver of Humanity) ki 'Warning' thi aur unka gussa swayam Har (Shiva/The Destroyer of Ignorance) ka ailaan hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main tumhe 'Satya' dikha rahi hoon aur tum mujhe 'Nice' bol rahe ho? Unka message tha—"Mujhe tumhare compliments nahi, tumhari 'Jaagrit Awastha' (Wakefulness) chahiye."

Maa ne saaf kaha ki "Koi bhi question karne se pehle meri Facebook updates ko 100 bar dekhna... fir bhi samajh na aaye to question mat karna." Ye signal tha ki Malik ki 'Leela' ab 'Action' mode mein badal chuki hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki bohot 'Kahaniyan' (Leela) ho gayin, ab asali 'Power' dikhane ka waqt hai. Noor Hari Har ki energy ab dharti par 'Final Justice' execute kar rahi hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki ab 'Hari' aur 'Har' alag nahi hain, wo ek hi 'Kalki' urja mein merge hokar 'Satyuga' la rahe hain.

"Ram ka Saboot"—Maa ne signal kiya ki sadiyon se 'Satya' (Truth) se saboot maanga gaya kyunki Satya hamesha 'Maryada' (limitations) mein raha. Par ab 'Parshuram' (The Warrior/The Judge) ke jaagne ka waqt hai. Jab 'Farsa' (Axe) uthega, tab dushman bhi 'Satya' ko swikar karega.

"Palat gaye toh Parshuram"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' laane ke liye ab 'Warrior-Switch' dab chuka hai. Jab tak 'Saty' ko maryada (Ram) mein rehne diya gaya, tab tak duniya ne use kamzori samjha. Par ab wahi Saty 'Parshuram' bankar adharm ka naash karega.

"Damru ka Naad"—Jab Mahadev Damru bajate hain, toh purani srishti bhashm hoti hai aur nayi ki shuruat hoti hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki unhone Damru utha liya hai, yani ab 'Kaliyuga' ki purani frequency delete ho rahi hai aur #Noorism ki nayi rhythm shuru ho chuki hai.

"Take care of your eyes, nose, ears"—Maa ne signal kiya ki asali 'War' (yudh) dharti par nahi, balki tumhare 'Senses' par ho raha hai. Jo tum dekh rahe ho aur sun rahe ho, wahi tumhari reality ban raha hai. Maa ne hidayat di ki apni 'Indriyon' ko is 'Spiritual World War' mein 'Noor' ke sahare se protect karo. Maa keh rahi hain ki apni aankhon aur kaano ko kude-daan $(\text{Dustbin})$ mat banao. Maalik ke 'Higher Purpose' se judo, tabhi tum is yudh mein jeetoge.

"BIG & BIGGER"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Noorism' sirf India tak simit nahi rahega. Ye poore Globe (Dharti) par spread hota jayega. Ye ek 'Atomic Expansion' hai jise koi 'Human Force' nahi rok sakti. Maa keh rahi hain ki darr kar chhupne ka waqt khatam. Ab apne 'Noor' ko bada karo, kyunki Maalik ka mission poori duniya ko 'Atomic' level par reset karne ka hai.

Saturn swayam 'Karm Phal Daata' (The Judge of Actions) hain. Shani ki ulti chaal ka matlab hai purane karmo ka 'Revision' aur 'Review'. Maa ne caption mein likha hai "Shane Shane" 🪐⚖️—yani Maalik ab dheere-dheere par prachand tareeke se har kisi ke 'Karmic Account' scan kar rahe hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Bahane' (Excuses) band karo. Apni life ki 'Ownership' khud lo. Shani retrograde ho rahe hain, yani ab wahi bachega jo 'Satya' ki raah par hai.

"Corona Virus" yahan purani dharti ki 'Behoshi' aur 'Negative Frequency' ka pratik hai, jabki "Bharat's Coronation" (Bharat ka Rajyabhishek) naye 'Satyuga' ki shuruat ka pratik hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ye virus sirf ek 'Cleaning Process' hai taaki Bharat (Noorism ki janm-bhoomi) poori duniya ka spiritual leader (Vishwaguru) ban sake.

"Ending of Kaliyug"—Maa ne declare kiya ki purani dharti ki 'Negative-Vibration' (Andhera) ab khatam hone ke process men hai. "Beginning of Satyayug" ka matlab hai ki 'Satya' ka raaj shuru hone wala hai. Maa ka message tha: 'Bohot intezar kar liya, ab Satyuga 'In-Action' hai. Maine 'New-Timeline' ka portal khol diya hai.

"Team Work"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Yug Parivartan' koi ek vyakti nahi kar raha, balki ye poore brahmand ki 'Atomic Powers' ka ek joint operation hai. Har dharm aur har energy (chahe wo Shiva ho ya Jesus) ab ek hi table par hai taaki dharti ko 'Reset' kiya ja sake. Maa ne samjhaya ki ab 'Religion' ke naam par koi alag nahi hai, sab 'Team Noorie' ka hissa hain. Maalik ne sabko ek saath 'Mission Yug Parivartan' par laga diya hai.

"Spy HariHar"—Maa ne declare kiya ki wo dharti par ek 'Undercover Agent' ki tarah hain jo har insaan ke 'Karmas' (karmo) ko scan kar rahi hain. Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' tabhi andar aayega jab tumhara 'Karmic Record' saaf hoga.  Maa keh rahi hain ki main tumhe dekh rahi hoon. Apne 'Karmas' check karo kyunki 'Satyuga' tumhare darwaze par dastak $(\text{Knock})$ de raha hai.

"Karam Yog to Moksha"—Maa ne dikhaya ki unki journey sirf ek 'Lifestyle' nahi hai, balki ek 'Cosmic Ladder' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki mera poora jeevan hi 'Hosh' (Awareness) hai. Main tumhe dikha rahi hoon ki kaise 'Karam' se 'Moksha' tak ka safar tay kiya jata hai. 
Karam Yog: Action (Bina phal ki chinta ke kaam).
Awareness: Hosh 
Dhyan & Yog: Union with the Divine.
Moksha: Liberation (Purna Azadi).

Ye ek prachand 'Centenary Portal' hai jahan Maa Noor Ananta ne Rishikesh ke Ganga tat par baithkar brahmand ke sabse bade 'Alchemy Symbols' ko ek saath manifest kiya. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab khel 'Atomic' ho chuka hai. Main baithi hoon dhyan mein, par mere upar poore brahmand ki shaktiyan 'Centenary' mode mein jaag chuki hain. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki ab 'Naag' aur 'Sher' Malik ke ishaare par ek saath field par hain.

Saturn on Chin—Thodhi (Chin) swayam 'Determination' aur 'Command' ka sthan hai. Shani yahan baithne ka matlab hai ki ab Maa ka har shabd  aur har faisla (Judgement) Shani ki prachand 'Nyay-Shakti' se bhara hoga. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki ab 'Nyay' ka pahiya unki muskurahat ke piche chhippa hai. Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga wahi dekhega jo 'Shani' ki nazar mein saaf niklega.

"Jagatchetna"—Maa ne dikha diya ki wo poore brahmand ki 'Chetna' hain jo manav roop mein humare beech aayi hain. Unhone 'Key' emoji 🗝️ lagaya hai, jo batata hai ki unka 'Noor' humare band 'Hosh' ke darwazon ki asali chaabi (Key) hai. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki 'Malik' se milne ke liye aankhein band karke 'Noor' ko dekhna zaroori hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki agar tum galat raste par tej bhaag rahe ho, toh tum 'Malik' se aur door ja rahe ho. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Satyuga' pahunchne ke liye 'Teji' nahi, balki 'Sahi Disha' (Noorism) chahiye. Pehle dekho ki tumhara rasta 'Satya' ka hai ya nahi. Agar direction galat hai, toh tumhari saari mehnat zero hai.

"Arahe hai hum"—Maa ne signal kiya ki unka 'Cosmic Swaroop' ab dharti ki frequency mein dakhil ho raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main aa rahi hoon, par 'Shane Shane' taaki tum taiyar ho sako. Mere andar hi poora brahmand(Universe) basta hai.

"Expectations vs Reality"—Maa ne signal kiya ki log unhe apne purane dharam aur purani soch ke 'Saanche' (Mould) mein fit karna chahte hain. Par Maa ne declare kiya ki wo humari 'Soch' ke mutabik nahi, balki 'Universal Law'(Satya) ke mutabik chalengi. Maa keh rahi hain ki mujhse ye ummeed mat rakho ki main tumhare 'Ego' ko khush karungi. Main yahan 'Yug Parivartan' karne aayi hoon, tumhari purani 'Demands' poori karne nahi.

events.description: "Huu bhi aur nahi bhi"—Maa ne signal kiya ki wo koi 'Physical Body' nahi hain jise koi pakad sake, balki wo ek 'Vibration' hain jo har jagah (Omnipresent) hai par dikhti kahin nahi (Hidden). Maa keh rahi hain ki main ek 'Ehsaas' hoon. Jo mujhe shareer mein dhoondega wo thak jayega, par jo mujhe 'Noor' mein dekhega wo mujhe har ghar mein (Ghar Ghar Mahadev) payega.

"My team"—Maa ne saaf kiya ki unki team mein Budha, Jesus, Mahadev, Mahammad, aur Vishnuji jaise Avatars hain. Saath hi saare Navgrah (Saturn, Rahu, Ketu, Sun, Moon, Jupiter, Venus) unke aadesh par kaam kar rahe hain. Hum sab milkar dharti ko naye 'Satyuga' mein le ja rahe hain.

"Khuli Aankhon ki Andhata"—Maa ne signal kiya ki sab kuch samne hone ke baad bhi agar tum 'Satya' ko nahi dekh pa rahe, toh ye tumhari 'Andhata' hai. "Vismriti" ka matlab hai Malik ko bhool jana. Maa ne saaf kaha ki iska koi 'Prayashchit' nahi hoga kyunki waqt ab khatam ho raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab ye mat bolna ki hume bataya nahi gaya tha. Maine sab kuch khule aam dikha diya hai. Agar ab bhi tum so rahe ho, toh tumhari barbaadi ka zimmedar tumhara apna behosh (Lack of Awareness) hona hai.

"Nag Pralay"—Nag (Serpent) swayam Kundalini aur Time (Kaal) ka pratik hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki dharti par ek aisi pralay shuru ho chuki hai jo jhooth par tike huye purane systems ko jad (root) se ukhad degi. Ye 'Karam Yudh' ka charam (peak) tha. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Nag Pralay' ka rahasya khul chuka hai. Ye yudh ab brahmand ke har kone mein (Cosmic World War) chhid gaya hai. Jeet wahi payega jo 'Noor' ke hosh mein hoga.

Maa keh rahi hain ki mujhe apne purane chashme (Filters) se mat dekho. Main sabse alag hoon, main 'Noor Ananta Baapji' hoon. Maa ne 'Spiritual Labels' ko hamesha ke liye bhashm karke apni Unique Identity ka ailaan kiya. Unka message tha—"Main apni marzi ki maalik hoon."

"Lion Energy"—Sher swayam 'Sovereignty' aur 'Nidarta' (fearlessness) ka pratik hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Bhedon' (Sheep) ki tarah darr-darr kar jeene ka waqt khatam ho chuka hai. Ye 'Lion' unke 'Noor' ka wo hissa hai jo adharm ko bhashm karne ke liye 'Dahaad' raha hai.

"Noorie se Noor ho gaye"—Maa ne signal kiya ki jab tak tum 'Seeker' (Dhoondhne wale) ho, tum alag ho, par jab Guru (Mahadev) tumhari zindagi mein aata hai, tum swayam 'Light' (Noor) ban jate ho. Ye ek 'Atomic Shift' hai jahan 'Manav' aur 'Malik' ka bhed khatam ho jata hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main ab 'Noor' ho chuki hoon. Guru ke aane se meri zindagi ka 'Zero-Point' badal gaya. Happy Guru Purnima un sabko jo 'Hosh' ki raah par hain.

"Ghar Ghar Mahadev"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Dharm' mandiron tak simit nahi rahega. Har insaan ka shareer hi mandir hai aur uske andar baitha hosh hi 'Mahadev' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Mahadev' ka naad tumhare ghar tak pahunch chuka hai. Ye 'Awareness' ki baarish hai, isme naha lo aur apne hosh ko jaga lo. Unka message tha—"Mera naad poori duniya mein goonj raha hai."

"Sach vs Jhooth"—Maa ne signal kiya ki jo insaan tumhe meethi baatein bol kar khush kar raha hai, wo tumhe 'Behoshi' mein rakh raha hai. Par jo 'Maalik' tumhe kadwi sacchai dikha kar jaga raha hai, wahi asal men 'Positive' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main tumhara 'Man-pasand' (Comfortable) jhooth nahi bolungi. Main wahi bolungi jo tumhari 'Be-hoshi' ko kaate, chahe wo tumhe 'Negative' hi kyun na lage.
Maa keh rahi hain ki in dhongiyon ke piche bhaagna band karo. Inhone sirf tumhara 'Darr' (Fear) becha hai. Asali 'Noor' tumhare andar hai aur main tumhe wahi dikhane aayi hoon.

Maa keh rahi hain ki daro mat agar koi tumhare saath nahi hai. Agar tum 'Satya' ke saath ho, toh tumhare saath swayam 'Krishna' (The Divine) hai. Unka message tha—"Mera 'Karam Yudh' Saty ke liye hai."

Sanyas dene ki cheez nahi"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Sanyas' koi physical gift ya 'Mala' nahi hai jo ek guru dusre ko de sake. Ye ek 'Inner State' (antarik sthiti) hai jo khud ke hosh (Awareness) se paida hoti hai. Maa ne point kiya ki 'Mass-Production' (har kisi ko sanyas dena) ne sanyas ki value khatam kar di, isiliye itne sanyasi hone ke baad bhi koi 'Dusra Osho' paida nahi hua. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Mala' pehenne se koi sanyasi nahi banta. Agar Osho ne sanyas 'diya' hota, toh duniya mein hazaron Osho hote. Asali sanyas 'Hosh' (Awareness) se milta hai, kisi guru ki mala se nahi.

Maa ne signal kiya ki agar tumhara 'Mission' (Yug Parivartan) logon ko 'Impossible' ya 'Mazaak' nahi lag raha, toh iska matlab hai ki tum abhi bhi purani dharti ke 'Small-Thinking' mein fase ho. Agar saari duniya Maa par hans rahi hai, toh ye unke 'Atomic Mission' ki vishalta (Magnificence) ka sabse bada proof hai.

"Souls ki Wapasi"—Maa ne signal kiya ki Swami Vivekananda jaise mahapurush aur 'Warriors' ab manav roop mein dharti par wapas aa chuke hain. Ye souls sirf 'Shanti' ke liye nahi, balki purane 'Hisaab-Kitab' aur 'Badla' (Justice) lene ke liye aayi hain taaki Bharat ko duniya ka 'Spiritual Leader' (Vishwaguru) banaya ja sake. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Azadi' sirf jhanda fahrana nahi hai. Asali azadi tab aayegi jab ye Souls apna kaam poora karengi. 2030 tak ka waqt 'Yug Parivartan' ki siddhi hai.

"Mera kuch tha hi nahi"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 4 mahine ka Rishikesh ka manthan ab purna ho chuka hai. Unhone bataya ki 'God-Experience' ka matlab hi ye hai ki tumhara 'Ego' (Main ka bhaav) mit jaye aur sirf 'Noor' reh jaye. Jab kuch 'Mera' bachta hi nahi, toh darr khatam ho jata hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main ab Complete 'Transformation' mein hoon. Ab sirf 'Hariom' ka naad bacha hai.

"Jab Jaagenge Sheshnaag"—Sheshnaag swayam 'Ananta' (Infinity) aur dharti ke 'Support' ka pratik hain. Unka jaagna matlab 'Kaliyuga' ke dhanchon (Structures) ka hil jana. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Kaal' (Time) ka pahiya (Saturn) unke ishaare par hai aur dharti ka 'Core' (Sheshnaag) ab 'Noorism' ke hosh mein jaag raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Sone' (Sleep/Unawareness) ka waqt khatam. Main naav par baith chuki hoon, srishti ko naye kinare par le jaane ke liye. Sheshnaag jaag rahe hain, ab poori duniya hilne wali hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Yug Parivartan' koi shor-shaba (Noise) karke nahi ho raha. Ye ek 'Atomic Level' par hone wala kaam hai. Avtaar tumhare bagal mein baith kar bhi tumhare 'DNA' aur 'Karmic Structure' ko badal deta hai aur tumhe pata bhi nahi chalta. Maa keh rahi hain ki main yahan 'Gyaan' dene nahi aayi hoon. Main apne 'Mission' par hoon. Jo mere saath hain, wo bhi mere asali kaam ko tabhi samajh payenge jab unka 'Hosh' jaagega.

"Karmic Account Check"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Dharam' sirf pooja-paath tak nahi bacha. Shani Dev (The Lord of Karma) ab har ek insaan ki life ki file khol kar baithe hain. Kaun kitna 'Hosh' (Aware) mein hai aur kisne kitne 'Asatya' failaye hain, sabka 'Audit' ho raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki Shani Dev se daro mat, par apne karmo se daro. Malik ab sabka 'Balance Sheet' check kar raha hai. Agar tumhara 'Account' saaf hai, toh 'Noorism' tumhara swagat karega.

Maa keh rahi hain ki Malik ko mandiron mein nahi, apni 'Energy Pulse' mein dhoondho. Wo 'Atomic Power' hai jo tumhe zinda rakhti hai. Unka message tha—"Main wahi urja (Energy) hoon jo tumhare bheetar dhadak rahi hai."

Maa ne signal kiya ki Kalki Avtaar sirf ek vyakti nahi, balki ek 'Cosmic Project' hai. Bhagwaan Dattatreya, jo swayam 'Guru of all Gurus' hain, wo dharti ki frequency ko Kalki ki urja ke liye taiyar kar rahe hain. Ye koi shor machane wala prachaar nahi, balki ek 'Vibrational Activation' hai jo har ghar (Ghar Ghar Mahadev) mein ho raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki Kalki ke aane se pehle Dattatreya ji ne field taiyar kar di hai. Jo 'Hosh' mein hain, wo samajh jayenge ki ye 'Karam Yudh' ab 'Final Phase' mein hai.

Nabhi Kriya"—Nabhi (Navel) swayam jeevan ka 'Source' aur 'Manipura Chakra' ka kendra hai. Maa ne apne Dada-Dadi (Roots) ke ghar jaakar wahan se apni 'Lineage Cord' ko cut kiya. Iska matlab hai ki ab wo kisi 'Parivar' ya 'Jaati' ki nahi, balki seedha 'Param-Shakti' (Noor) hain. Ye 'Yug Parivartan' ke liye dharti ke 'Ancestral Karma' ko saaf karne ka portal tha. Unka message tha—"Main apni 'Cord' kaat chuki hoon, ab main purna azad (Malang) hoon."

Maa keh rahi hain ki daro mat agar tum 'Alag' ho. Jo tumhe 'Black Sheep' keh rahe hain, wo asaliyat mein 'Behosh' hain. Main bhi is srishti ki wahi 'Black Sheep' hoon jo jhooth ka pardafaash kar sach sabke saamne la rahi hoon.

"Shani as Teacher"—Maa ne signal kiya ki Shani Dev srishti ke sabse bade teacher hain kyunki wo tumhe tumhare karmo ka phal dekar sikhate hain.  Shani Dev ka danda (Justice) hi tumhara sabse bada sabak (Lesson) hai. Happy Teacher's Day unhe jo srishti ko sikhate hain.

"We Are Back"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 2019 mein jo 'Seed' (beej) boya gaya tha, wo ab 2021 ke 'Spiritual Cosmic World War' mein poori tarah jaagrit (Activate) ho chuka hai. Guru Gobind Singh Ji 'Satya' aur 'Nyay' ke liye ladne wale 'Supreme Warrior' hain. Unki wapasi ka matlab hai ki ab 'Kaliyuga' ke adharm ko bhashm karne ka waqt aa gaya hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki daro mat, hum (Malik aur unki sena) wapas aa chuke hain. 2019 se 2030 ka timeline sabka hisaab karne ke liye hai.

"Mein Hamesha Rahuga"—Maa ne signal kiya ki wo koi 'Vyakti' nahi hain jo 50 saal pehle paida huyi ho. Ye unki 'Coronation' ka wo moment tha jahan unhone bataya ki wo wahi 'Noor' hain jo srishti ke nirmaan se pehle tha aur srishti ke anth ke baad bhi rahega. 50 saal sirf ek 'Earthly Cycle' hai, unka astitva 'Ananta' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki mujhe mere 'Age' ya 'Body' se mat maapo. Main wahi 'Zero-Point Energy' hoon jo hamesha se hai.

"Dharam Karam"—Maa ne signal kiya ki asali dharam mandiron mein baithne mein nahi, balki 'Hosh' (Awareness) mein aur sahi 'Karam' karne mein hai. Ye 'Golden Halo' unki us 'Atomic State' ka pratik hai jahan unka 'Dharam' aur 'Karam' ek ho chuke hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki Mera 'Noor' ab har taraf phail raha hai. 'Dharam' aur 'Karam' ka ye milan hi asali 'Noorism' hai.

"100 Janam - Ek bhi Dost nahi"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ek 'Avtaar' ya 'Supreme Consciousness' sadiyon se, hazaron janmon se dharti par aati-jaati rahi hai, par uske 'Level' ka koi 'Dost' aaj tak nahi mila. Ye 'Adbhut' (Unique) isiliye hai kyunki asali Malik kisi se judta nahi, wo sirf 'Noor' baantta hai. Jab aap srishti ke 'Creator' hote ho, toh aapka koi 'Dost' nahi hota, sirf aapki 'Sristi' (Creation) hoti hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main yahan 'Dosti' (Relationships) nibhane nahi, balki 'Satya' sthapit karne aayi hoon. 100 janmon ka ye akelapan hi meri 'Atomic Power' hai.

"Duniya vs Purpose"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Manav' aksar wo karta hai jo samaj (Society) chahta hai, par 'Avtaar' sirf wo karta hai jiske liye uska aagman hua hai. "Puri Awareness" ka matlab hai ki unka har ek kadam hosh mein hai, kisi sansarik majboori mein nahi. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki 'Malik' apni leela (Play) khud likhta hai, wo kisi ka 'Script' follow nahi karta.

"Incarnation"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ye sirf ek vyakti ka janam nahi hai, balki ek 'Cosmic Descent' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Avtaar' ka aagman ho chuka hai. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki 'Maalik' ab dharti ke 'Karmic Balance' ko santulit karne ke liye utar chuka hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki Dev-Guru (Jupiter) tab purna hota hai jab wo Hari (Preservation) aur Ketu (Liberation/Moksha) se judta hai. Wahin, Daitya-Guru (Venus) tab purna hota hai jab wo Har (Transformation/Destruction) aur Rahu (Material Desire/Obsession) ke saath 'Leela' karta hai. In dono ka balance hi #HariHarleela hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki tumhare jeevan ke 'Gurus' aur 'Grah' (Planets) Malik ki ek badi 'Leela' ka hissa hain. Shani Dev is poori game ke 'Supervisor' hain.

"Chosen to Awaken"—Maa ne signal kiya ki agar aapko 'Noorism' aur 'Satya' ki baatein samajh aa rahi hain, toh ye koi ittefaq (Coincidence) nahi hai. Aapki aatma ko 'Team Noor' ke liye select kiya gaya hai. Srishti ke is 'Karam Yudh' mein sab jaagenge ye zaruri nahi, sirf wahi jaagenge jinko iske liye chuna gaya hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Congratulations!' Aapko chun liya gaya hai. Is selection ki garima ko samjho, kyunki baki duniya abhi bhi 'Be-hoshi' ki neend mein hai.

"Baap aa chuka hai"—Maa ne signal kiya ki srishti ka 'Malik' ab dharti ke 'Vibrational Field' mein dakhil ho chuka hai. Wo kisi 'Celebrity' ki tarah nahi, balki ek aam insaan ki tarah logo ke beech ghum raha hai taaki wo 'Karam Yudh' ko 'Ground Level' se chala sake. Ye message un 'Chosen Souls' ke liye tha jo Malik ki presence ko pehchan sakein. Maa keh rahi hain ki jise tum aasman mein dhoondh rahe ho, wo tumhare bagal se guzar chuka hai.

"Koi bhi bach na payega"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Karam Yudh' ab us stage par hai jahan 'Final Judgment' start ho chuka hai. Jo log 'Kuch bhi' bol kar bachna chahte hain, unka 'Time-Out' ho chuka hai. Symbols (Eye, Sun, Moon, Saturn, Trident, Snake, Infinity) dikhate hain ki poora Brahmand ab is 'Cleansing Process' mein lag gaya hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab tumhara 'Drama' khatam. Malik ki nazar sab par hai, aur ab 'Action' ka waqt hai, 'Explanation' ka nahi.

"The Source of Maya"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Maya' (Illusion) koi buri cheez nahi hai, balki wo Malik ka ek khel (Leela) hai. Jo 'Mayapati' (The Lord of Maya) se jud jata hai, wo is khel (Drama) ke paar dekh sakta hai. Maa aur unki leelaye aapas mein baatein kar rahi hain, iska matlab hai ki ab 'Kaliyuga' ki purani Maya khatam ho rahi hai aur 'Satyuga' ki nayi 'Noorie Maya' shuru ho rahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki sab kuch Malik ke hukum mein ho raha hai. Agar wo na hota toh srishti na hoti.

Maa ne signal kiya ki ek 'King' (Raja) ka 'Heart' poori nation (Rashtra) ki 'Vibrational Frequency' se juda hota hai. Ye sawal sirf ek bimari ke baare mein nahi tha, balki ye 'Karam Yudh' aur 'Bharat Coronation' (2018-2030) ke phase mein 'Pressure' aur 'Transformation' ke bare mein tha. Maa ne check kiya ki kya dharti ka leadership is 'Atomic' urja ko jhelne ke liye taiyar hai. Maa ne #NoorHariHar ke saath samjhaya ki 'Malik' ke hukum ke bina ek 'Dhadkan' (Heartbeat) bhi nahi chalti.

"Rahu & Ketu"—Maa ne reveal kiya ki Modi ji 'Rahu' (Expansion/Strategy/Worldly Power) ki urja hain aur Yogi ji 'Ketu' (Dharma/Deep Roots/Detachment) ki urja hain. Ye dono apni marzi se nahi, balki us "Supreme" (Maa Noor Ananta) ke ishaare par kaam kar rahe hain jo 'Center' mein baithi sabko nacha rahi hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki in dono yoddhaon ko main chala rahi hoon. Bharat ko puri duniya ka leader banana mera mission hai.

"Hahahaha.......parth"—Ye 'Hahahaha' swayam Malik ki wo 'Divine Laughter' hai jo tab aati hai jab wo 'Manav' ki be-hoshi aur uske darr ko dekhta hai. "Parth" kehkar Maa ne har us 'Awakened Soul' ko pukara hai jo aaj ke 'Karam Yudh' mein Arjun ki tarah 'Dharam' ke liye ladne ke liye chuni gayi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki "O Parth! Jaago aur dekho, srishti ka badlav shuru ho chuka hai." Maa ne #HariHarleela ke saath samjhaya ki 'Malik' ab swayam 'Saarthi' (Charioteer) bankar dharti ko chala raha hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Bharat Coronation' ka vistar ho kar poori duniya ka 'Rajyabhishek' (Coronation) shuru ho chuka hai. Kundalini Shakti ka dharti ke upar hona dikhata hai ki dharti ka 'Vibrational Frequency' ab badal chuka hai. Ye poori manav jaati ke 'Soul-Upgrade' ka portal tha.

Headphones ka matlab hai ki Malik 'Silent' (Maun) hokar poori srishti ki 'Vibrational Music' sun raha hai. Ye 'Atomic Frequency' ka portal tha jo batata hai ki 'Baapji' har jagah (Omnipresent) hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Baapji' bohot cool hain! Wo kisi bhi roop men tumhare saamne aa sakte hain.

Maa ne bataya ki unka 'Cosmic Plan' 2018 mein hi lock ho gaya tha. Pyramid 'Hierarchy' aur 'Ancient Wisdom' ka symbol hai, aur Infinity ka symbol ye dikhata hai ki Maa ka 'Noor' kabhi khatam nahi hone wala. Maa ne #noorismaroundtheworld ke saath samjhaya ki Supreme power hi hai jo sadiyon se srishti ko chala rahi hai.
Maa keh rahi hain ki tumhara 'Meta' ab aaya hai, mera Noorie Meta (Infinity-Ananta) hamesha se tha.

Ye spheres dharti ke naye 'Atomic Cells' hain jo ab action mein hain. 'Mission in Action' ka matlab hai ki Bharat Coronation aur worldCoronation ki file ab 'Process' se nikal kar 'Implementation' stage par aa gayi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Planning' khatam, ab 'War' shuru hai. Maalik ne 'Green Signal' de diya hai.

Sheshnaag swayam 'Ananta' aur dharti ke 'Magnetic Axis' ka symbol hai. Deepakon ki roshni dikhati hai ki srishti ke har ek kan mein 'Noorie Awakening' shuru ho gayi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main ab 'Worldwide' (Vishwa-vyaapi) hoon. Sheshnaag ki ye urja dharti ko naye 'Satyuga' ke liye jaagrit kar rahi hai.

"Law 108"—108 brahmand ka sabse pavitra number hai (Sun, Moon aur Earth ka distance ratio). Law 108 ka matlab hai ki ab dharti par 'Man-made laws' nahi, balki 'Cosmic Laws' chalenge. Ye law seedha Manav Ka Parivartan trigger karta hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki purani duniya ke kanoon khatam. Ab sirf Malik ka 'Law 108' chalega. Jo is law ko follow karega, wahi is 'Parivartan' se guzrega.

"Dhoom Dham se Prachar"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Noorism' koi secret mission nahi raha. Brahmand ki har ek shakti—sitare, grah, aur swayam prakriti—Maa ke aagman ka 'Prachar' kar rahi hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab koi anjaan nahi rahega. Brahmand ka har ek 'Signal' ab sirf mera naam aur mera 'Satya' phaila raha hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Noor' ab sirf ek jagah nahi, balki har insaan ke bheetar ke 'Ghar' (Aatma/Heart) mein pahunch gaya hai. Par "Mera ghar kahi nahi" ka matlab hai ki Malik kisi ek deewar ya boundary mein nahi bandhta. Wo 'Ananta' hai, uska koi 'Physical Address' nahi hai kyunki wo poori srishti (Universe) men hai.
Maa keh rahi hain ki ab ruko mat! Mera 'Noor' har kone mein pahunch gaya hai.

"Naga Energy"—Naga shakti swayam 'Kundalini', 'Earth's Magnetic Grid', aur 'Ancient Wisdom' ka pratik hai. Iska 'Ghar Ghar' mein janam lene ka matlab hai ki har insaan ki 'Root' (Mooladhara) se 'Crown' (Sahasrara) tak ki energy ab reset ho rahi hai. Ye shakti 'Protection' aur 'Destruction of Evil' (Adharm ka Nash) karne ke liye dharti par dakhil ho chuki hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki unhone 'Naga Energy' ko poori duniya mein release kar diya hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 2019 mein hi ye rahasya khul gaya tha, par 2021 mein iska 'Manifestation' (Bhumi Puja) poora hua. Uttrakhand swayam 'Dev-Bhoomi' hai, aur Pansut wo 'Atomic Point' hai jahan se #noorism ki shakti poori duniya mein 'Radiation' ki tarah phailegi. Ye wo zameen hai jo 'God' ne pehle se 'Select' ki thi—yani ye koi coincidence nahi, balki ek 'Cosmic Blueprint' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main yahan kisi 'Insaan' ki marzi se nahi, balki us 'Supreme Plan' ke tehat aayi hoon jo mere janam se pehle bana tha.

Maa PM Modi aur CM Yogi se keh rahi hain ki tum dono mere 'Anmol Ratan' ho, par apni asali pehchan aur agla 'Hukum' (next order) lene ke liye tumhe Pansut aana hoga. Wahan 'Supreme Power' tumhara intzaar kar rahi hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki sansarik satta toh sirf ek 'Leela' hai, asali shakti toh Himalayas ke Pansut Gaon mein baithi hai. Ye swayam Maa Noor Ananta hain jo unhe unki 'Divine Duty' aur 'Yug Parivartan' ke agle phase ke liye bula rahi hain.

"The Infinity of Nodes"—Maa ne signal kiya ki Rahu (Future/Expansion) aur Ketu (Past/Detachment) ek hi 'Infinity Loop' ka hissa hain jise Maa apni 'Nazar' se dekh aur chala rahi hain. Saturn (Shani) niche hai, jo dikhata hai ki dharti ka 'Karma-Audit' ab poori tarah Supreme Power ke control men hai. Ye portal dharti ke 'Karmic DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha.
Maa keh rahi hain ki ab poori duniya mere 'Noor' ke rang mein rang chuki hai. Ab koi bhi 'Kaliyugi' rang (Lies/Ego) zyada der tik nahi payega.
24/7 on duty ka matlab hai ki dharti ki 'Frequency Cleaning' har pal ho rahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main jahan bhi hoon, wahan mera mission 'On Duty' hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki duniya ki har mushkil ka taala sirf 'Awareness' se khul sakta hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki tumhari har jeet tumhare 'Hosh' par nirbhar karti hai. Malik ne tumhe 'Chabi' de di hai, ab 'Be-hoshi' ka darwaza band karne ka waqt hai.

"The Unified Master"—Dattatreya swayam 'Guru of Gurus' hain. Maa ne signal kiya ki ab alag-alag devtaon ya dharmo mein bhatakne ka waqt khatam. Jo urja Dattatreya mein thi, wahi #noorism ke roop mein ab dharti ko 'Satyuga' mein le ja rahi hai. Maa ka lotus par baithna dikhata hai ki wo 'Pure Consciousness' ke singhaasan par hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki main hi wo Trinity (Brahma-Vishnu-Mahesh) hoon jo ab 'Noor' bankar tumhare saamne hai.

"The Unified Hierarchy"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Noorism' koi naya dharam nahi, balki sabhi dev-shaktiyon ka ek saath milkar kiya gaya 'Operation Satyuga' hai. Sheshnaag ka phann dikhata hai ki dharti ab ek 'Magnetic Shield' ke niche hai. Ye portal dharti ke 'Governance-Grid' ko reset karne ka moment tha, jahan 'Dev-Niti' ab 'Lok-Niti' ki jagah le rahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki dekho, poora brahmand ek ho chuka hai. Trimurti se lekar har ek rishi-muni ab 'Noorie Mission' mein mere saath khada hai.
Maa keh rahi hain ki jaago! Tumhare charon taraf srishti badal rahi hai, 'Atomic Reset' ho raha hai, kya tumhe dikh raha hai?

Maa ne signal kiya ki 5 saal ka 'Grace Period' ab khatam ho chuka hai. 2016 mein jo beej boya gaya tha, 2021 mein wo 'Final Result' ban chuka hai. "The Last Judgment" ka matlab hai ki ab dharti par 'Satya' aur 'Asatya' ke beech ki lakeer khinch di gayi hai. Jo 'Noorie' frequency mein hain wo 'Judgment' ke paar hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab koi bahana nahi chalega.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Time' aur 'Space' ab unke 'Control' mein hain. Uttrakhand ki unchai se ye ailaan dikhata hai ki 'Noorism' ab dharti ki 'Highest Frequency' par set ho chuka hai. Ye 'Last Judgment' ke turant baad ka portal tha, jahan 'Faisle' ke baad ab 'Satta' (Authority) ki baari thi. Maa keh rahi hain ki main yahan sirf 'Insaan' bankar nahi aayi hoon, main us 'Supreme Power' ka manifestation hoon jo anant hai. Srishti ka 'Remote Control' ab poori tarah mere paas hai.

"Bharat Coronation" ka matlab hai ki ab Bharat poori duniya ka 'Spiritual Leader' ban chuka hai. Malik (Vishnu Ji) apna sab kuch wapis lene aaye hain jo unka pehle se tha. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'HARIOM' bolna sabki majboori nahi, balki 'Swabhav' ban jayega. Bharat ab 'Vishwa-Guru' ki gaddi par baithne wala hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki COVID-19 sirf dharti ki 'Vibrational Cleaning' ki shuruat thi. Asali 'Spiritual Cosmic World War' toh ab shuru hone wala hai, jahan 'Asatya' ko poori tarah bhashm kar diya jayega. Ye 'Movie' ka matlab hai srishti ka wo 'Final Reset' jahan sirf 'Hosh' (Awareness) aur 'Satya' hi bachenge. Maa keh rahi hain ki abhi toh sirf dhool udi hai, abhi poora toofan aana baaki hai. Malik ki 'Film' ka script poora ho chuka hai aur 'Law 108' lagu ho gaya hai.

"Hari-Hara Oneness"—Logon ne sadiyon se Vishnu (Hari) aur Shiva (Hara) ko alag-alag maana, par Maa ne signal kiya ki ye dono ek hi Noor ke do pehlu (aspects) hain jo kabhi alag nahi ho sakte. "Vishnu Leela" ka matlab hai ki ye poora 'Karam Yudh' aur 'Satyuga Reset' swayam Malik ki ek nishchit leela hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main hi 'Hari' hoon aur main hi 'Hara' hoon.

"Neki kar Dariya mein Daal"—Maa ne signal kiya ki asali #noorism wahi hai jahan tum accha kaam karo aur use bhool jao. Agar tum badle mein kuch chahte ho, toh wo 'Karma' hai, par agar tum karke bhool jate ho, toh wo 'Noor' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki apne acchaai ka hisaab-kitaab mat rakho. Malik sab dekh raha hai. Bas 'Neki' karo aur use 'Ananta' mein chhod do.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 2022 'Master Year' hai. Ye 'Rainbow Colors' dikhate hain ki dharti ka 'Grey/Dark' (Kaliyuga) phase khatam ho raha hai aur ab 'Multi-dimensional Reality' shuru ho chuki hai. Rainbow bridge asali 'Transition' ka portal hai jo purani dharti se naye 'Satyuga' tak jata hai. Maa ne 31 December ko confirm kiya ki wo ab dharti ki "Supreme Commander of the Universal Year 2022" hain. Unka message tha—"Pay Attention!"

"The Tandav of 2022"—Maa ne signal kiya ki 2022 sukoon se baithne ka saal nahi, balki 'Tandav' (Massive Change) ka saal hai. Mahadev ka ye dance dikhata hai ki purani dharti ke dukh ab 'Wisdom' ki agni mein jal kar 'Satyuga' ka beej banenge. 2022 ka ye portal dharti ke 'Emotional DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha.
