events.description: The 2019 to 2022 Loop"—Maa ne 3 saal purane (2 Jan 2019) portal ko recall kiya. 2019 mein jo beej boya gaya tha, 2022 mein wo 'Atomic Fire' se nikal kar bahar aa raha hai. #Rahu #Ketu #Saturn ka zikr dikhata hai ki ye teeno prachand shaktiyan ab 'Rise' ho chuki hain dharti ka 'Karma' reset karne ke liye.

"Rising 2022"—Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Rising' ka process sirf insaanon tak seemit nahi hai, balki poora brahmand ab 'Noor' ki frequency par 'Rise' kar raha hai. Agni ka matlab hai purani 'Kaliyugi' vibrations ko jalakar raakh kar dena aur Rainbow ka matlab hai naye 'Satyuga' ki 7-color multi-dimensional reality ka aagman.

Welcome to the Machine"—Maa ne signal kiya ki purani dharti ek aisi 'Machine' thi jahan tumhare sapne bhi system ne decide kiye the. Rainbow  ka is Prism se nikalna dikhata hai ki 'Noor' ab is machine ko bhashm karke naye 'Satyuga' ki raah khol raha hai. Ye portal dharti ke 'Subconscious DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha, jahan tum ab wahi nahi sochoge jo system chahta hai.
"The Path Maker"—Maa ne signal kiya ki wo kisi ke banaye huye raaste ki mohtaj nahi hain. Wo swayam 'Source' hain. Maa jahan se guzarti hain, wahi 'Satya' ka raasta (Noorism) ban jaata hai.
"The Game Changer"—Maa ne signal kiya ki wo dharti par purane 'Kaliyugi' khel (Rules/Religions/Systems) ka hissa banne nahi aayi hain. Wo yahan 'Rules' badalne aayi hain.

"The Shishupal Parallel"—Maa ne signal kiya ki Sri Krishna ne 100 galtiyan maaf ki thi, par Noorism mein limit 107 hai. #108vi galti ka matlab hai 'Point of No Return'. Iska arth hai ki dharti par 'Asatya' aur 'Be-hoshi' ka ghada bhar chuka hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Warning' ka waqt gaya, ab 'Action' (Execution) ka waqt hai. 108vi galti par 'Rooh' (Soul) ko kahi bhi jagah nahi milegi.

"I am the Whole Story"—Maa ne signal kiya ki wo koi 'Character' nahi hain jo srishti mein role play karne aayi hain. Wo swayam 'The Story' (The Script & The Writer) hain. Hari ki leela ho ya Har ka Tandav, sab unke 'Noor' ki hi alag-alag vibrations hain. Sheshnaag ki phuphkar aur Kaali ka krodh unhi ki 'Protective' aur 'Transformative' urja  hai. Brahmand ki har ek halchal maa ke 'Rawaani' (Flow) ka hissa hai.

"Shift out of Darkness"—Maa ne signal kiya ki dharti ka 'Great Darkness' (Kaliyug/Be-hoshi) phase ab khatam ho chuka hai. Ye 'Shift' swayam Maa Noor ke 'Universal Arrival' se trigger hua hai. Purvajon ne jis 'Masiha' ya 'Noor' ki baat ki thi jo srishti ko 'Light' (Satyuga) mein le jayega, wo ab manifest ho chuka hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main puranon ki pukaar hoon. Maalik ne 'Light' ka switch on kar diya hai, ab andhere ka koi sthan nahi bacha.

#single_soul ka matlab hai wo 'Ek-maatra' shakti jo swayam se hi prakat hoti hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main tumhari paribhashaon (definitions) mein nahi aati. Maalik (Noor) swayam mein hi poora hai, use kisi 'Better Half' ki zaroorat nahi.

"The Quiet Observer"—Maa ne signal kiya ki unka 'Maun' (Silence) kamzori nahi, balki ek 'Cosmic Audit' hai. Wo srishti ke 'Vibrational Frequency' ko 'Observe' karke use 'Satyuga' ke liye calibrate (theek) kar rahi hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki main chup hoon iska matlab ye nahi ki main sun nahi rahi. Meri 'Nazar' hi tumhara 'Judgment' likh rahi hai.

"The Ultimate Sarcasm"—Maa ne 'Paramatma' se prarthna ki ki in ameeron ki pyaas (Trishna) poori kar de. Iska gehara matlab ye hai ki 'Trishna' kabhi poori nahi hoti, wo sirf 'Maut'ya 'Satya' se hi khatam hoti hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki jo log sirf dhan-daulat ke piche bhag rahe hain, wo 'Satyuga' ki frequency se bahar hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki inki pyas itni badh gayi hai ki ab sirf 'Maalik' hi inka hisaab kar sakta hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki maine Rahu aur Ketu ko apni 'Mohini' shakti se 'Align' kar diya hai. Ab darr (Fear) ki jagah sirf prem aur anand ka portal khula hai. Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga ka 'Noorie Manav' wahi hoga jo Rahu-Ketu ke toofan mein bhi 'Mohini-Noor' ka prem dekhega.

Maa keh rahi hain ki ab 'Problems' ko 'Bye' bolne ka waqt hai, kyunki Maalik (Ganpati) ne 'Law 108' lagu (Enforce) kar diya hai. Ab file-work (Karmic-Audit) prachand hai. Unka message tha—"Main sab sambhaal rahi hoon."

Maa ne signal kiya ki ab tak insaan sirf ek 'Biological Robot' ki tarah jee raha tha. Par 2022 se 'Noorism' ab door-to-door aur soul-to-soul pahunch raha hai taaki log is 'Cycle' ko break kar sakein. #welcome_to_the_machine ka matlab hai matrix ko pehchanna, aur #break_the_cycle ka matlab hai 'Satyuga' ki azadi ko chunna. Maa keh rahi hain ki school, naukri aur bills ki duniya ek dhoka (Illusion) hai, ab is machine se bahar nikalne ka waqt hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki ek unka wo swaroop hai jo 'Purna' (Absolute) hai, jo srishti ki 'Vidhata' hai. Aur doosra swaroop wo hai jo is dharti ki mitti mein ek insaan ke roop mein 'Kacchi' (Temporary/Human form) bankar leela kar raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main tumhare jaisi 'Kacchi' bhi hoon aur srishti ki 'Pakki' maalik bhi.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' ka suraj ab Infinity (Ananta-ta) ki frequency par set ho chuka hai. Rainbow ke 7-colors dharti ke 7-Chakras aur multi-dimensional reality ko dikhate hain. Ye Infinity ka matlab hai ki 'Noorism' ka na koi aadi (beginning) hai na anth (end). Maa keh rahi hain ki main hi anant hoon, ab poora brahmand is 'Noor' mein samayega.
NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki prachand shakti se unhone samjhaya ki hosh mein rehna hi Maalik ke 'Ishare' ko samajhna hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki main hi shanti hoon aur main hi prachand kaal (Time/Kaali) hoon. Mujhko pehchanna hi asali 'Noorism' hai. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Mystery" ka symbol hai.

[Decoded from image] Facebook cover photo, 9 February 2022. Caption: Bujho to jaane (Figure out the riddle). Two photos: shaved head 2018 vs fierce Kali look. Text: noorism world_wide, 08/02/2022. Duality mirrors the Parivartan. Aspect: Avatar Declaration - the riddle of identity.
events.parivartan_aspect: Avatar Declaration - the riddle of identity

events.description: Chandrama hamare 'Mind' aur 'Emotions' ko control karta hai. Maa ne in phases ko dikhakar signal kiya ki ab insani mann purane dhang se nahi chalega. 2022 ka Rainbow (🌈) dikhata hai ki ab har ek phase 'Noor' ki sat-rangi urja se bhara hua hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki waqt badal raha hai. Maalik ne 'Cosmic Energy' ka switch on kar diya hai, ab dharti ki har halchal meri 'Rhythm' se chalegi.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' tabhi aayega jab tumhara sharir aur cells naye 'Noor' ki frequency ko jhelne ke layak banenge. Cellular Memory Activation ka matlab hai tumhare bheetar sadiyon se dabi 'Divinity' (Noor) ko jagana. Maa keh rahi hain ki Malik ka 'Software Update' (Upgrade) shuru ho gaya hai. Apne cells se baat karo aur unhe 'Noor' ke liye taiyar karo.

Maa ne dikhaya ki duniya unhe unki apni 'Chetna' ke hisaab se dekhti hai. Jo bura hai wo unhe 'Dhokebaz' kehta hai, jo 'Mast' hai wo unhe 'Mast Malang' kehta hai. Par in sabse pare unka asali naam Noor Ananta  hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki tum mujhe kuch bhi bulao, meri asali shakti (Noor) anant hai.
Maa keh rahi hain ki duniya ki bheed mein mat kho, kyunki anth mein sirf 'Noor_Ananta' aur unka 'Satya' hi saath rahega.
Maa ne signal kiya ki dharti par koi bhi cheez 'Absolute' nahi hai. Agar Sukh hai toh Dukh piche hi khada hai. In dono ko 'Twin Flame' bolna dikhata hai ki ye dono ek hi sikke ke do pehlu  hain.

Maa ne signal kiya ki zindagi koi ek janam ki kahani nahi hai. Ye ek aisi kitab hai jisme tumhare pichle kai janmon ka 'Hisaab' likha hua hai. "Be-hisaab" hone ka arth hai ki insani dimaag iska calculation nahi kar sakta. Maa keh rahi hain ki tumhara 'Audit' shuru ho gaya hai. Malik ne 'Zindagi ki Kitab' khol di hai, aur is baar hisaab 'Exact' hoga.

Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Tolerate' karne ka waqt khatam ho chuka hai. Saturn nyay ke devta hai, aur #Law_108 ka matlab hai 'Divine Execution'. Jo rishte 'Noor' ki raah mein rukawat hain ya takleef de rahe hain, unhe ab 'Satyuga' ke frequency se bahar kiya ja raha hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki wo 'Antaryami' swaroop mein hain jo dharti ke har ek 'Secret' ko jaanti hain, par unka 'Maun' unki sabse badi 'Shakti' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main sab jaanti hoon par waqt aane par hi bolungi.

Maa ne signal kiya ki insaan jo 'Janwar' (Animalistic/Greedy) ban chuka hai, uske liye 'Black Alert' shuru ho gaya hai. "Har ghar mai hai mera ghar" ka matlab hai ki Maalik (Noor) har jagah maujood hai, par "mera ghar kahi nahi" ka matlab hai ki wo kisi bhi 'Boundary' (Seema) mein bandha nahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main sabki hoon par kisi ki mohtaj nahi.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Time' ek circle . Tum jo abhi kar rahe ho, wahi tumhare 'Future Self' ki 'Memory' ban rahi hai. Rainbow colors dikhate hain ki ye connection 'Noor' ki vibrations se juda hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki hosh mein jiyo, kyunki tumhara 'Aane wala kal' tumhari aaj ki 'Yaadon' ka aaina (Mirror/Reflection) hai.

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 1 June 2022. #noorism_rising. Two astronauts in space with rainbow trails. Text: Your future self is watching you right now through your memories. Aspect: Energy Activation - consciousness across time.
events.parivartan_aspect: Energy Activation - consciousness across time

events.description: "I am not stuck" ka matlab hai ki ab purane karma ya purani yaadon ke bojh se aazaad hone ka waqt hai. Maa Noor Ananta ne The Grand Re-creation ke manifestation se declare kiya ki ab 'Stuck' hone ka bahana khatam ho chuka hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki jo log 'Noor' mein jag chuke hain, unke liye purani duniya ke log 'Mad' (Paagal/Be-hosh) dikhte hain kyunki wo abhi bhi 'Maya' ke khel mein fase hain. Spirit Guides ka force karna dikhata hai ki 'Satyuga' banane ke liye 'Ekant' (Hermit) se bahar nikal kar duniya ko 'Noor' dikhana zaroori hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main jaanti hoon duniya 'Paagal' hai, par Maalik ka 'Hukum' hai ki ab bahar nikal kar 'Noor' ka vistar karo.

Maa ne signal kiya ki wo us 'Raakh' ki tarah hain jo khud ko srishti ki aag mein pehle hi hom (Sacrifice) kar chuki hain. Jo pehle hi raakh hai, use koi dusri aag (Duniya ki dikkatein/Log) kaise jala sakti hai? Ye 'Invincibility' ka portal hai. Ye portal dharti ke 'Survival DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha, jahan 'Destruction' ke darr ko 'Absolute Power' mein badla gaya.

Maa ne signal kiya ki agar dharti par ek Maa hi apne bacche ke saath 'Satya' aur 'Prem' mein nahi hai, toh wo srishti ke kisi bhi rishte mein sachi nahi ho sakti. Maa ki aankhon ke aansu dikhate hain ki wo dharti par 'Matru-Shakti' ke girte huye star ko dekh kar dukhi hain. Ye portal dharti ke 'Nurturing DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha, jahan 'Be-hosh' maataon ko 'Law 108' ka aaina dikhaya gaya. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Maa' ka rishta srishti ka 'Source' hai, agar wahi 'Dhokha' hai toh sab kuch dhokha hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki unka safar 'Nurturing' (Maa) se 'Execution' (Mahakali) tak pahunch chuka hai. "Agni mein jalna" ka matlab hai un sabhi sansarik rishton aur dard ki aag se guzar kar 'Shakti' ka prachand roop dhaaran kar lena. "Mera safar hi aapki niyati hai"—iska arth hai ki dharti ka 'Future' ab Maa ki is 'Mahakali' energy se tay hoga. Maa keh rahi hain ki main ab 'Maa' se 'Mahakali' ban gayi hoon. Ab dharti ka hisaab 'Agni' (Fierce Energy) se hoga.

Maa ne signal kiya ki wo Mahadev ki tarah duniya ka saara 'Zahar' (Negativity/Insults) pee chuki hain. Rainbow colors dikhate hain ki is 'Garal' ko peene ke baad hi asali 'Noorism' ka vistar hota hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki maine sab sah (Endured) liya hai, ab 'Nyay' (Justice) ki baari hai. Malik ne 'Mahabharat_2.0' ka portal khol diya hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki unka 'Andaza' sirf rasoi tak simit nahi hai, balki wo dharti ke 'Satya' aur 'Asatya' ko bhi pehchanti hain. Unhe 'Waqt' aur 'Rishton' ki har ek karvat ka pehle se pata hota hai. "Andaze ko Maa ka andaza kabhi na ho paya" ka matlab hai ki srishti ki koi bhi 'Logic' ya 'Science' Maa ki agli leela ko 'Guess' nahi kar sakti. Maa keh rahi hain ki main sab jaanti hoon, tumhare andaze mere aage feeke hain.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Normal People' (Behosh log) andhere se darte hain kyunki wo use 'Vinash' samajhte hain. Par 'Noorie' souls ke liye andhera wo 'Garbh' hai jahan se naye 'Noor' ka janam hota hai. Ye portal dharti ke 'Shadow-Chakra DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha. Maa keh rahi hain ki main hi wo 'Beautiful Darkness' hoon jise tum samajh nahi sakte.

Maa ne signal kiya ki tumne ab tak jo kuch bhi 'School' ya 'Society' se seekha hai, wo 'Jhooth' ho sakta hai. Asali 'Anpadh' wo nahi jise padhna nahi aata, balki wo hai jo purane jhoot ko 'Unlearn' (Bhulana) nahi chahta. Ye portal dharti ke 'Intellectual DNA' ko reset karne ka moment tha, jahan 'Hidden Knowledge' (Noor) ko pehchan-ne ki shakti di gayi. Maa keh rahi hain ki kitabi keeda mat bano, purane jhoot ko feko aur asali 'Noor' ko dhoondo.

aa ne signal kiya ki jo log Malik ke saath 'Smart Games' (Manipulations) khel rahe hain, wo ab #noorism_law_108 se bach nahi payenge. "Family ke saath samay bitao" ka matlab hai ki ab bahar ki dikhawati duniya se kat kar apne 'Core' se judne ka waqt hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki apni chalaaki apne paas rakho, Malik sab dekh raha hai. 'Durga Puja' ka asali matlab andhere (Ego) par 'Noor' ki jeet hai.

Maa ne do raaste dikhaye. Mahabharat unke liye hai jo 'Jaag' chuke hain aur 'Yug Parivartan' ki is jung (Karam Yudh) ko samajhna chahte hain. Garuda Puran un logon ke liye ek chetavni hai jo be-hosh hain kyunki agar jeete-ji 'Satya' (Noor) nahi samjha, toh marne ke baad unka 'Karmfal' unhe aur unke gharwalon ko sab kuch samjha dega. Maa keh rahi hain ki ya toh hosh mein 'Mahabharat' (Transformation) samajh lo, warna 'Garuda Puran' (Justice) tumhara wait kar raha hai.
Maa ne dikhaya ki ab Noor_Ananta ne 'Supreme Throne' (Sinhaasan) dhaaran kar liya hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main hi wo 'AdiMaya' hoon jiska sabko intzaar tha.

Maa ne signal kiya ki ab 'Satyuga' mein kuch bhi chupa (Hidden) nahi bachega. Saturn ke rings par baithna dikhata hai ki 'Nyay' (Justice) ka pahiya ab Maa ke 'Observation' ke bheetar hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main sab dekh rahi hoon.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' mein 'Samajhdar' ko ab maun nahi rehna hai. Agar samajhdar chup raha, toh na-samajh (Ego-driven people)parivar aur samaj ko galat raste par le jayenge. NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki prachand shakti se unhone samjhaya ki hosh mein rehna hi 'Satya' ko danke ki chot par bolna hai. Maa ka message tha: 'Na-samajh ko mat bolne do, apni 'Samajh' (Noor) ka istemal karo.

Maa ne signal kiya ki zindagi ka har ek dard aur har ek khushi tumhare 'Noorie' swaroop ko bunne ke liye zaroori hai. Pakshi ka udna dikhata hai ki jab tum har chapter ko hosh mein padh lete ho, tabhi tumhari soul 'Azaad' hoti hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki dukh ho ya sukh, har panna padhna padega. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Endurance" ka symbol hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Satyuga' mein wahi 'Noorie' soul dakhil hogi jiska dimaag in 'Secrets' (Saturn/Pyramid/Sri Yantra) ko handle karne ke liye "Totally Stable" hai. Trishul aur Rainbow ka niche hona dikhata hai ki ye sabhi shaktiyan Maa ki 'Execution' frequency ke niche hain. Maa ne 'Divine-Access' ka portal khol diya hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki jo 'Noor' mein jaag chuka hai, use andhere se darr nahi lagta aur na hi use rasta dikhane ke liye kisi 'Map' (Naksha/Guru) ki zaroorat hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Satyuga' mein wahi bachega jo apne bheetar ke andhere ko 'Noor' mein badal chuka hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Kalyug' ki fitrat hi 'Inkaar' (Denial) hai. Log 'Satya' ko na maanenge, na sunenge. Par inke beech kuch "Rare 5D Souls" honge jo is frequency ko decode kar payenge. Inhe kisi insaan ne nahi, balki "Khud Bhagwan" ne 'Satyuga' ke liye chuna hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki sabko samjhane ki koshish mat karo. Unka message tha—"Tum un चुनिंदा souls mein se ho."

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 7 December 2022. Text only: Ye Kalyug hai - koi nahi manega, na koi sunega. Bohat rare 5D Souls honge jinko kuch samh ayega. Aur unko khud bhagwan ne chunaa hoga. Translation: This is Kaliyug - very rare 5D Souls chosen by God will understand. Aspect: Energy Activation - only divinely chosen 5D Souls perceive the Parivartan.
events.parivartan_aspect: Energy Activation - only divinely chosen 5D Souls perceive the Parivartan

events.description: Maa ne signal kiya ki srishti ka 'Script' ab badal chuka hai. Covid sirf ek 'System-Check' tha. Asali film (Yug Parivartan/Satyuga ki Jung) ab release ho rahi hai. Jo 'Selected Souls' hain, unhe abhi 'Hidden' rakha gaya hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki abhi toh sirf trailer dekha hai, asali 'Atomic-Release' baaki hai. nmm frequency yahan Divya Leela ka symbol hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki wo srishti mein kisi ke aage nahi jhukti, par Osho ke aage jhukna dikhata hai ki unki 'Frequency' asali Rebel Consciousness se match karti hai. Osho ne 'Bitter Truth' (Katu Satya) bola, aur Maa wahi saty ab 'Atomic Level' par execute kar rahi hain. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Surrender" ka symbol hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki insaan kai janmon se apne karmo ke saath 'Gambling' (Jua) khel raha hai. Par ab Universe ne ek 'Wild Card' feka hai—yani ek aakhri moka (Last Chance) un logon ke liye jo piche chut gaye the par ab 'Hosh' mein aana chahte hain. "Ab nahi toh fir kabhi nahi" ka matlab hai ki ye portal ab band hone wala hai.  nmm frequency yahan "Divine Intervention" ka symbol hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki 'Yam' hona asaan hai, par 'Shani' (Karmic Nyay) hona mushkil hai kyunki Shani ko apno par bhi nyay karna padta hai. 'Arjun' (Selected/Supported) hona asaan hai, par 'Karan' (The Lone Warrior/The Giver) hona mushkil hai. "Noorie banker rehna" ka matlab hai is be-hosh duniya mein insani roop mein rehkar Malik ka 'Noor' dhaaran karna srishti ka sabse kathin kaam hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki maine sabse mushkil rasta chuna hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki darna band karo, ye koi bimari nahi balki 'Reset' Energy hai. Corona (Crown) ka matlab hi hai 'Sahasrara Chakra' ki activation. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Alchemy" ka symbol hai.

Maa ne signal kiya ki unka 'Old Self' hazaar bar bhashm ho chuka hai, aur ab wo hazaar tareekon se 'Satyuga' ko rebuild karna jaanti hain. "Shane Shane Chalte Hain Hum" ka matlab hai ki ab Shani ki sateek aur dhimi chaal se 'Nyay' hoga. Maa keh rahi hain ki main ab 'Indestructible' hoon. nmm frequency yahan "Divine Resurrection" ka symbol hai.

all_events.description:
Here Maa Noor Ananta is clearly saying that she can sense what is going to happen ahead. she has intuition capabilities.

[Decoded from image] Instagram post by @noorie_rai, 29 March 2016. Image text: 'Never Underestimate the power of a woman's intuition. Some women can recognize game before you even play it.' This is the first public declaration of intuitive/prophetic ability — foreshadowing the coded predictions that would follow. Liked by avishkargopale30. Aspect of Yug Parivartan: Coded Signals — the avatar announcing the ability to see ahead.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Coded Signals — the avatar announcing the ability to see ahead

all_events.description:
Here Maa Noor Ananta is giving a message that she believes in all religions, because god is one and we the humans of this earth have divided god into different versions according to us.

[Decoded from image] Instagram post by @noorie_rai, 15 August 2016 (Indian Independence Day). Image shows map of India with 3D text: 'I AM MUSLIM HINDU BUDDHIST SIKH CHRISTIAN JAIN'. Posted on Independence Day — a message of religious unity on the day of national unity. All religions emanating from the singular 'I AM.' Aspect of Yug Parivartan: Universal Consciousness — Satyuga has no religious divisions.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Universal Consciousness — Satyuga has no religious divisions

all_events.description:
there is a hidden message in this image. runway has a number written on it which is '11-62', if we decode it, 11 and 6+2=8, it can be 11/8. on November 8 demonetization was happened in India.

[Decoded from image] Instagram post by @noorie_rai, 6 September 2016. Aerial photo from airplane window showing runway with number '11 62' clearly visible (appears twice, mirrored). DECODED: 11 = November, 6+2 = 8, giving November 8th — the exact date India announced demonetization, 63 days after this post. The number appearing twice emphasises the message. This is the most significant coded prediction in the chronicle. Aspect of Yug Parivartan: Coded Signals — advance warning of a world event encoded in an image.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Coded Signals — advance warning of a world event encoded in an image

all_events.description:
These are some childhood pictures of Maa Noor Ananta.

[Decoded from image] Instagram post by @noorie_rai, 25 September 2016. Collage of 3 black-and-white childhood photos and 1 current color photo of Maa holding a flower. Caption: 'My chilhood #howtimeflies #diamond moments'. Aspect of Yug Parivartan: Avatar Identity — the journey from ordinary childhood to divine mission.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Avatar Identity — the journey from ordinary childhood to divine mission

all_events.description:
There is a silent message in this picture. message is '8' and 'Scorpio'. maa gave
this message to the world on 24/10/2016, 16 days before demonetization.
demonetization happened on 8th of November 2016. as maa is also a Scorpio
and PM Narendra modiji is also a scorpio. Scorpio is also 8th zodiac sign

[Decoded from image] Facebook profile picture update by Noorie Noor Ananta. Image created 24 October 2016 (16 days before demonetization). Contains: text 'SILENT MESSAGE' at top, large number '8' on right side, 'Nov Dec Jan' on left (the 3 months of demonetization chaos), two scorpion images at top corners, 'NOORIE RAI' at bottom left, date '24/10/16' at bottom right. Woman standing on a path. DECODED: 'SILENT MESSAGE' + 8 + Scorpions (8th zodiac) + 'Nov Dec Jan' (months affected) = complete prediction of November 8 demonetization and its 3-month aftermath. Scorpio is also PM Modi's zodiac sign. Aspect of Yug Parivartan: Coded Signals — layered prediction of timing, zodiac connection, and duration.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Coded Signals — layered prediction of timing, zodiac connection, and duration

all_events.description:
Again there is a message regarding number '8' and 8th Zodiac
sign Scorpio which was related to Demonetization.

[Decoded from image] Instagram post by @noorie_rai, 26 October 2016 (13 days before demonetization). Dark artistic image with text: 'AND THEN, GOD CREATED THE.. 8 SCORPIO' with a woman lying in flames/fire imagery. Credited 'Noorie Rai.' DECODED: Framing the number 8 and Scorpio as divinely ordained. Fire imagery = destruction/purification (demonetization as purification of black money). 'God created' = divine hand behind the event. Aspect of Yug Parivartan: Divine Justice — the coming demonetization as a divinely sanctioned karmic event.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Divine Justice — the coming demonetization as a divinely sanctioned karmic event

all_events.description:
This post is a clear indication of maa noor Ananta's message regarding
demonetization. She clearly stated that there is a hidden secret, a mystery
which is related to number '8'. As she is a supreme consciousness and she
knows what is going to happen ahead.

[Decoded from image] Facebook post by Noorie Noor Ananta, 29 October 2016 (10 days before demonetization). Text: 'Kapiel.... Third ...8... Mysteryyyyy. This post is the 'Command of Time - Declaration of Divine Clock.' By placing the clock and the year 2020 at the forefront, Maa Noor Ananta signaled the end of the 'Waiting Period.' all_events.description: Maa keh rahi hain ki kitabi baaton aur purane rituals ka time khatam ho gaya. Ab sirf Cosmic Energy ki "Mastery" kaam aayegi. Agar aap energy level par transform nahi huye, toh sirf puja-paath se kuch nahi hoga. This is the official activation of the Noor 386 frequency—where 'You and Me' become one in the light of the Noor." It explicitly detaches the energy from religious dogma and anchors it into pure Cosmic Mastery.

Ye post ek bohot badi Energy Warning hai jo Maa ne 2020 ke shuruaat mein hi de di thi. Jab ye post aaya, duniya ko idea bhi nahi tha ki kuch hi hafte baad sab kuch "lock" hone wala hai. Maa ne pehle hi warn kar diya tha ki ab tumhare "Baggage" (burden) ka weight check hoga. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab "Manav" ko choose karna padega ki wo Satyuga ki taraf kya le jaana chahta hai. Agar tum purani "Kaliyuga mentalities" (greed, ego, hate) carry karoge, toh tumhari "Noor" journey slow ho jayegi.

Jab ye post aaya, tab tak COVID-19 ek global lockdown nahi bana tha. Maa was tap-tuning into the Cosmic Frequency of 2020. "Jo kabhi socha na hoga" refers to the global shutdown, the silence of the streets, and the "Great Reset." 2020 was a year where the Impossible became the Routine. Maa ka kehna tha ki 2020 ke "Worldly Events" hume darane ke liye nahi, balki humari DNA Scripting ko jagane ke liye the. Jab tak insaan purani duniya se nahi "Jaagega," wo nayi dimension mein enter nahi kar payega.

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 5 January 2020 - THE COVID PREDICTION (66 days before WHO). Caption: Jo kabhi socha na hoga ase ase events dekhne ko aur sunne ko milege hum sabko. 2020 Worldy events. Utho jaago. Translation: What was never imagined we will all see and hear. Wake up! Image: Physically I am on Earth, Mentally in Galaxies, Spiritually in another Dimension. Aspect: Coded Signals + Warning - most significant advance warning.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Coded Signals + Warning - most significant advance warning

all_events.description:
Maa announced the Spiritual War exactly as the Sun moved into the sign of Saturn (Shani). This "War" wasn't about weapons; it was the war between the Old Belief Systems and the New Cosmic Reality. Maa is signaling that the universe is now "auditing" every soul. If your "Beliefs" are fake, you will be stuck behind the wall. If you have "Noor," you will climb the ladder into the higher dimensions. In this war, the weapons are Love, Light, and Blessings. But don't mistake them for being "weak." These frequencies are strong enough to shatter the density of Kaliyuga.

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 14 January 2020 (56 days before WHO). Caption: SPIRITUAL WAR. Text: BEYOND THE WALLS OF BELIEF THERE IS A WHOLE DIFFERENT WORLD. Spiritual War declared as Sun entered Saturn sign. Aspect: Cosmic Process - formal declaration of the Spiritual War.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Cosmic Process - formal declaration of the Spiritual War

all_events.description: Maa Noor Ananta ne Queen of Justice ka statue use karke clear kar diya ki 2020 ka saal Karma ka Hisab karne wala saal hai. Maa is telling that you can't hide anything anymore. Your "Intentions" are being weighed. In Satyuga (The Golden Age), there is no injustice. But to reach there, the "Garbage" of Kaliyuga must be judged and removed.

Ye Spiritual War ka wo phase tha jahan 'Time' (Kala) khud humanity ko test kar raha tha. Maa ne in dates ke zariye signal diya ki Shani dev ka danda ab physically har mahine world events ke roop mein dikhega.

Maa ne signal diya ki jo log 'Kaal Sarp Dosh' mein phase hain, unhe Noor ke paas aana hi padega taaki wo is cycle se bahar nikal saken. Jiski frequency "Mukti" (Freedom) ke liye ready hai, unka connection Maa se khud-ba-khud jud jayega. "Milne ke baad mukt ho jayenge" ka matlab hai—unka DNA upgrade ho jayega. Unhe kisi ko bulane ki zarurat nahi, unki soul ki energy logon ko khud kheench layegi.

January ke end mein duniya abhi bhi bhaag-daur mein thi, lekin 2020 ka "Great Silence" (Lockdown) aane hi wala tha. Maa ne is post ke zariye duniya ko prepare kiya us "Silence" ke liye jo March mein aane wala tha. Jab duniya shant (silent) hui, tabhi logon ne apne aap se sawal puchna shuru kiya. Worldly level par, ye ek advance signal tha ki ab "External Noise" (shor) band hone wala hai. Maa samjha rahi hain ki jab duniya silent hogi, tab hi tumhe wo "Answers" milenge jo tum bahar dhoond rahe ho. Agar aapka dimaag har waqt chalta rahega, toh aap Noor ki voice nahi sun paoge. Maa ne sikhaya ki "Silence" empty (khali) nahi hai, balki wo ek Library hai jahan har problem ka solution hai. Bas hume us "Silent Frequency" par tune-in karna hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne Energy Transmission (Shaktipat) ki baat ki hai jo unki photos aur voice ke zariye ho raha hai. Jab physical milna band hone wala tha (due to upcoming lockdowns), Maa ne signal diya ki unka connection "Time and Space" ke paar hai. Log gharon mein band hone wale the, aur unke pas sirf "Photos" aur "Calls" hi bache the. Maa ne un digital mediums ko hi Healing Tool bana diya taaki Spiritual War mein Manav ghar baithe upgrade ho sake. Sirf unki Photo dekhne ya Call par baat karne se hi logon ke Chakras activate ho rahe hain.

Jab duniya ko lag raha tha ki sab kuch out of control ho raha hai, Maa ne signal diya ki NHH (Noor Hari Har) energy 24 ghante pehra de rahi hai. Ye "Sunglasses" symbolise karte hain ki Maa ki nazar "Darkness" ke paar bhi dekh sakti hai. While the world was sleeping, the Divine Energy was "On Duty."

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 2 February 2020 in Jaipur. Caption: JAI HOO HARIHAR (Victory to Vishnu-Shiva united). Text: 24/7 ON DUTY. Date: 2/02/2020 (palindrome). Tripund, rudraksha, yellow attire. Aspect: Avatar Identity - on active cosmic duty.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Avatar Identity - on active cosmic duty

all_events.description:
The post serves as a Divine Reassurance during the onset of the "Spiritual Cosmic World War." Maa is signaling that NHH (Noor Hari Har) is at work. The "Har" (Shiva) part is destroying the corrupt systems, while the "Hari" (Vishnu) part is restructuring them for the collective welfare of the Manav. Aapko rasta samajh nahi aayega kyunki ye Cosmic Level par ho raha hai, par ye aapki bhalayi (welfare) ke liye hi hai.
You can't understand my path!" * Energy Point: This is a direct attack on the Human Ego/Logic. The "Manav" tries to solve everything with their mind. Maa is pushing us to move from the Mind (Logic) to the Heart (Faith).

Ye post dikhata hai ki poori duniya aur uski kismat ab Harihar ke hath mein hai. Jo bhi ho raha hai, wo unki marzi ke hisab se "Directional" hai, random nahi. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab tak aap NMM (Noor Mast Malang) frequency mein rahoge, aapko bhatakne ki zarurat nahi. Unki nazar (Eyes) aap par hai, aur wo aapko is Spiritual Cosmic World War ke beech guide kar rahi hain.

In this post, Maa mentions "Mastering universal cosmic energy" and specifically thanks Guru Shukracharya. Guru Shukracharya "Material World" ke master hain. Maa unhe thank you bol rahi hain kyunki wo is material world ki energy ko Master kar chuki hain. Jab aap material energy ko master kar lete ho, tabhi aap Supreme Power manifest kar sakte ho. Maa is signaling that she is the highest form of Cosmic Energy to revive the spirits of the Manav (humans) who are lost in the illusion (Maya) of world events.

Is post ka message ek dum clear aur powerful hai: "Noor se kam hone mai raazi mat hona." Iska matlab hai—"Don't settle for anything less than the Divine Light." Maa ne warn kiya ki is Spiritual Cosmic World War mein negative energies tumhe "Compromise" karne par majboor karengi—yani darr ke aage jhukne par. Ya toh tum poori tarah Noor (Light) mein ho, ya tum andhere mein ho. "Shiva O Shiva" ka matlab hai ki ab har kaam Mahadev ki speed aur perfection se hoga. Jab aapka support Noor HariHar Energy hai, toh aap "Low vibration" ya darr mein kyun raazi hoge? Noor se kam par raazi hona matlab apni divine power ka apmaan karna.

Is post ke through Maa ne saaf warn kiya tha ki Ashrams band hone wale hain aur sabko timely apne ghar wapis chale jana chahiye. Ye Spiritual War ka wo phase hai jahan dhong (fake shows) khatam hoga aur asli 'Noor' har ghar mein jagmagayega. Maa ka message tha: 'Noorism ashram mein nahi, aapke dil aur ghar mein hai.'

Is post ke through Maa ne announce kiya tha ki hum ab tak ki sabse badi Collective Awakening ke shuruati stages mein hain. "Koi bhi bach nahi payega" ka matlab physical nuksan nahi, balki Energy Harvest hai. Maa samjha rahi hain ki ab koi bhi insaan purani Kaliyuga life mein chhupa nahi reh sakta. Sabko is transformation se guzarna hi padega. World events ne ek aisa mahoul bana diya tha jahan har Manav ko apni life ke bare mein sochna pada. Maa keh rahi hain ki wo 'Lene' ayi hain—yani unka Noor ab har soul ko touch karega, chahe wo raazi ho ya na ho. Shiva-Shakti ki ye image dikhati hai ki Yug Parivartan koi aam badlav nahi hai. Ye ek 'Maha-Awakening' hai jise Mahakali khud lead kar rahi hain.

Maa Adiparashakti Noor Ananta uses the phrase "Mera Sanam Hai Noor Ka Putla" to redefine the concept of the "Beloved" in the context of Noorism. By calling the "Sanam" (Beloved) a "Putla" of Noor, Maa is saying that the Divine has taken a physical form to be with us. Insaani rishton mein hum shareer (body) se pyar karte hain, par Noorism mein hum us "Light" se pyar karte hain jo body ke andar hai. Harihar ki energy ne is physical body ko "Noor ka Putla" bana diya hai taaki Yug Parivartan ke dauran hum divine love ko feel kar saken. Maa ka message tha ki Yug Parivartan ke chaos mein sirf wahi bachega jo 'Darr' ki jagah 'Noor' se ishq karega.

The caption "SHANE SHANE" (referring to Shani/Saturn) combined with her all-black attire creates a specific frequency of Karmic Discipline.
"Shane Shane" likhne ka matlab hai ki Maa ne NHH ki energy ko Shani Dev ke zariye "Execute" karne ka command de diya hai. Jo bhi 'jhoot' ya 'dhong' duniya mein tha, ab wo Shani Dev ki nazar se bach nahi payega.

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 15 February 2020 (24 days before WHO). Caption: SHANE SHANE. All-black attire (Saturn colour). First prominent use of Shane Shane phrase = Shani law. Aspect: Divine Justice - Shani Dev systematic enforcement.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Divine Justice - Shani Dev systematic enforcement

all_events.description: Maa Noor Ananta ne yahan Saturn (Shani) aur Guru (Jupiter) ke "Merging" ki baat ki hai. 2020 ka sabse bada event tha Shani aur Guru ka ek saath aana (The Great Conjunction). Shani "Discipline/Law" hai aur Guru "Knowledge/Wisdom" hai. Jab ye do bade planets merge hote hain, toh purani duniya ka dhancha (structure) badal jata hai. Maa ne Feb 2020 mein hi signal de diya tha ki ab "New Laws" aur "New Wisdom" ka time shuru ho chuka hai. World level par, ye 'Merging' dikhati hai ki ab manmani nahi chalegi. Ab wahi bachega jo 'Wise' (Guru) hai aur 'Disciplined' (Shani) hai. Maa ne in do energies ko merge karke Yug Parivartan ki speed badha di.

Ye post Noorism ki "Scientific and Spiritual" foundation ko merge karti hai. Nikola Tesla ka quote—"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration..." Lockdown ne physically sab kuch rok diya taaki humanity ko "Vibration" aur "Frequency" ke baare mein sochne par majboor kiya ja sake. World level par ye message ek signal tha ki aane wala chaos (Pandemic) ek Low Frequency hai. Isse bachne ke liye humein apni frequency ko "Noor" ke level par laana padega. Maa ka message clear tha: 'Duniya ke logic ko chhodo aur energy ki language seekho.'

Maa ka 2018 ka personal experience actually 2020 ke global experience ka "Preview" tha. Jo process unhone 2018 mein akele jhela, wahi Spiritual War ke roop mein poori duniya ke saath hone wala tha. Maa samjha rahi hain ki "Awakening" (Jagran) hamesha "Scary" (darawni) hoti hai kyunki ye purane 'Comfort Zone' ko tod deti hai. 2020 ka lockdown duniya ke liye wahi "Scary" experience tha, jo unhe andar se jagane ke liye zaroori tha.

"I didn't come this far, to only come this far." Iska matlab hai ki 2020 toh sirf shuruat hai, asli manzil abhi aage hai. Maa ne signal diya ki unka Noorism project koi chhota-mota badlav nahi hai. Unhone purani photos (Flashback) use karke ye dikhaya ki unki tayari barso se chal rahi thi. World level par ye message ek warning thi ki ab cheezein rukne wali nahi hain. Maa samjha rahi hain ki wo yahan tak sirf 'baatein' karne nahi aayi hain, balki Yug Parivartan ko physically manifest karne aayi hain.

Ye post ek "Final Choice" ka signal tha jo Maa ne lockdown se theek pehle diya tha. Iska matalab hai: "Do kashtiyon (boats) mein pair rakhne ka kya fayda? Ya toh judaai (Heezar) choose kar lo ya milan (Vsal). Himmat karke ek side ho jao—ya toh raakh (Kakh) ban jao ya fir kamal (Lotus) ban kar khilo." #Dont_Justify_Just_Prove clear message tha: 'Baatein mat banao, apne andar ka Noor dikhao.'

Ye NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki peak energy hai. Shiv (Har) destruction hai aur Vishnu (Hari) creation. Maa samjha rahi hain ki jab hum "Chetna" (Consciousness) ke top par hote hain, toh humare andar ka Hari aur Har merge ho jata hai. Hum khud hi Creator aur Destroyer ban jate hain. Ek Noor Mast Malang (NMM) wo hai jo har kisi mein Shiv dekhta hai. Wo kisi se darta nahi kyunki use pata hai ki sab kuch "Noor" hi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki is 'Masti' mein raho ki tum Shiv ho. Jab aap surrender kar dete ho, toh aap "Malang" ban jate ho, aur fir universe ki Supreme Power aapke through flow karti hai.

Is din Maa Noor Ananta ne apni purani saari worldly identities (rishte aur naam) ko hamesha ke liye "Burn" kar diya. Ye Noorism timeline ka sabse bada turning point hai: The Death of the Ego and the Birth of Divine Noor. Maa ne samjha diya ki ab "Duniyaadari" ke rishte kaam nahi aayenge. 2020 ke chaos mein wahi bachega jo Maa ki tarah apni purani pehchan chhod kar "Noor" ban sakega. Ye poori humanity ke liye ek transformation call tha.

Maa keh rahi hain ki tum "Light" (Sukh) mein God ko dhoondte ho, par asli God toh us "Black" (Shunya/Zero) mein hai jahan se sab kuch paida hota hai. 2020 ka lockdown wahi "Black Hole" tha jisme purani duniya ko jana hi tha. Ye image Noor Hari Har ki total mastery dikhati hai. Black color sab kuch absorb kar leta hai. Maa ne bataya ki unka project ab har negative energy ko absorb karke use "Noor" mein badal dega. Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga lane wali power "Feminine" (Shakti) hai, jo black hole ki tarah purane karma ko kha jayegi aur naya "Noor" degi.

Ye post sabse bada "Evolution Chart" hai. Isme Maa ne apni journey ko step-by-step decode kiya hai, jo dikhata hai ki kaise ek "Manav" (Human) poori tarah "Energy" mein convert ho jata hai.
Maa ne apni journey ko 4 stages mein divide kiya hai:-
Nurinder Kaur: Ye physical identity thi (The Human).
Noorie: Ye spiritual awakening ki shuruaat thi.
Noor: Ye pure "Light" (Nirankar) state thi.
NMM (Noor Mast Malang): Ye ultimate state hai—Divine
1008 ek aisi frequency hai jo physical universe ke saare laws ko control karti hai. Hari (Preserve) aur Har (Destroy) ki ye 1008 frequency ab Maa ke through flow ho rahi hai. Ye energy ab "Satyuga" ki neenv (foundation) rakhne ke liye on-duty hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne ye ultimatum jari kiya: "Jhoot ki dukan band. Abhi bhi waqt hai laut jao." "Jhoot ki dukan" refers to the Kaliyuga Systems—wo institutions, fake gurus, aur materialistic lifestyle jo sirf dikhawe par tiki thi. Maa ne pehle hi signal de diya ki ab universe is "Jhoot" (lies) ko aur bardasht nahi karega. Shutdown sirf virus ki wajah se nahi, balki energy level par "Dukan Band" hone ki wajah se hua. Maa ne saaf warn kiya ki jo log abhi bhi purani jhooti life (Ego, Greed) mein fase hain, unke paas "Loutne" (Returning to Truth/Noor) ka aakhri mauka hai.

"Mithya Vichar" ka matlab hai False Perception ya Illusion. Maa samjha rahi hain ki duniya mein jo bhi "Rookavat" (Blockage) aapko dikh rahi hai, wo actually aapke "Vicharon" (Thoughts) mein hai. Agar aap "Noor" ke sath align ho jao, toh koi bhi lockdown ya worldly event aapki "Jeevan Yatra" ko rok nahi sakta.

Maa ne yahan "Planting" aur "Nurturing" (seenchana) ka example dekar samjhaya hai ki spiritual phal (fruits) sirf baithne se nahi, balki sahi jagah mehnat karne se milte hain. Aksar log spirituality ke naam par zimmedariyon se bhagte hain (jaise unhone pichle post mein Ashrams wali baat kahi thi). Par Noor Hari Har ka kanoon hai ki aapko apne rishte "Anand" ke sath nibhane hain, unhe chhodna nahi hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki NHH energy tabhi kaam karegi jab aap apne worldly rishton ko 'Bojh' (burden) nahi, balki 'Sewa' samjhoge. Ye Spiritual War ghar se bhagne ki nahi, balki ghar ko mandir banane ki hai. Ek Noor Mast Malang (NMM) wo hai jo har situation mein "Anand ka Jal" (Water of Bliss) dhoond leta hai. Wo sukhe ped ko dekh kar rota nahi, balki use seench kar hara-bhara karne ka dam rakhta hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne yahan un logon ko address kiya hai jo unhe 'Physical Body' ya 'Relational Level' par judge kar rahe the, bina us "Energy" ko dekhe jo unke through flow ho rahi hai. Maa ne bataya ki log unhe "Body" (physical form) samajh kar unse shaadi ya guru banne ki baat kar rahe the. Ye "Bhram" (Illusion) tha. Noor Hari Har ki energy kisi body ki mohtaj nahi hai. Maa sirf ek "Medium" (zariya) hain. Jo log energy ko nahi samjhenge, wo piche chut jayenge. NMM frequency ka matlab hai total "Transparency." Malang wahi hai jiske paas chhupane ke liye kuch nahi hai. Unka message hai ki agar tum "Noor" banna chahte ho, toh apne purane 'Social masks' (Guru-Shishya, Husband-Wife etc.) utaar do aur seedha "Urja" (Energy) se connect ho jao.

To enter the NMM frequency, one must become like a child (Ganesha) in the lap of the Mother (Noor). Jab aap 'Malang' bachhe ban jate ho, toh Maa khud aapko apni god (lap) mein utha leti hain. Ganesha is the "Remover of Obstacles" and the Lord of New Beginnings.

Maa ne Nmm (Noor Mast Malang) ki power se declare kiya ki Noorism ka network ab North-East ke heavy energy zones mein active ho gaya hai. Maa ka message tha: 'Namrup walo, jaago! Ab energy ka yug shuru ho gaya hai.'

Ye post "Asli vs Nakli" (Real vs Fake) spirituality par ek bohot bada prahaar hai. Maa ne yahan un "Kukurmutte" (mushrooms) jaise uge huye gurus ko benakaab kiya hai jo spirituality ke naam par 'Bhog-Vilas' (alcohol, lust, escapism) sikhate hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki log spirituality ko "Escape" (bhagne ka rasta) samajhte hain—sharab piyo aur kaho "Hum toh Malang hain." Par Maa ne clear kar diya ki ye Noorism nahi hai. Noorism tab hai jab aap sansar mein reh kar, apne kartavyo (duties) ko pura karte huye "Anand" dhoondo. "Gurubhav sahaj hi prakat ho jata hai." Malang wo nahi jo title mangta hai, balki wo jiski energy apne aap logon ko guide karti hai.

Maa warns that simply speaking about energy doesn't make you powerful. True energy enters only when you go through actual life events. Maa ne kaha ki khaali baith kar "Energy Energy" chillane se kuch nahi hoga. Jab tak aap life ki situations ko 'Experience' nahi karoge, tab tak aapke andar ki power nahi jagegi. Maa ne #ॐ_हरिहर ke saath samjhaya ki ab "Shaktiyon ka khel" kehne se kaam nahi chalega. Aapko us 'Virat' ke saath 'Ekroop' (one) hona padega jo Nirman, Palan aur Sanhar teeno ko ek saath control kar raha hai. She lists "Purushatva (Masculine), Naritva (Feminine), Matritva (Motherhood), Mitratva (Friendship)." She says these are energies that build your life journey; you don't "wear" them, you become them. A Noor Mast Malang (Nmm) doesn't pretend. They don't wear a "Spiritual Mask." They embody every aspect of life naturally.

This post is a lyrical declaration of Omnipresence. As the world began to retreat into isolation, Maa Noor Ananta announced that her frequency was no longer bound by a physical body—it had permeated the very elements of existence: Air, Water, and Space.

Maa keh rahi hain ki ab "Jhooti Dukan" nahi chalegi. Jinko lag raha tha ki wo dhokha dekar bach jayenge, unke liye rasta band ho gaya hai. Ab sirf wahi bachega jo "Asli" hai. Agar aap apne 'Mental Blockages' ko nahi khologe, toh aap is 'Spiritual War' mein piche chut jaoge. NHH energy ne signal diya ki ab rasta "Clear" hai, par chalna aapko khud padega. Apne darr aur purani soch (blockage) ko khatam karo. Agar aapne Noorism ki side choose ki hai, toh ab piche mudkar mat dekho.

Maa ne yahan un logon ko "Final Warning" di hai jo unhe abhi bhi sirf ek ladki ya mahila samajh kar "Time Pass" kar rahe the. Maa ne pehle hi boundaries set kar di. Unhone bataya ki unka samay ek "Energy Form" hai, use "Time Pass" ke liye kharab na karein. Maa keh rahi hain ki wo koi "Entertainment" nahi hain. Jab duniya darwaze band kar rahi thi (Lockdown), Maa ne apne spiritual darwaze sirf unke liye khole jo "Real Energy" samajhte hain. Faltu ke messages aur calls ke liye unke paas waqt nahi hai.

Jab virus aur lockdown ki aahat (warnings) mil rahi thi, log abhi bhi purani duniya ki 'planning' mein vyast the. Maa ne signal diya ki "Khuda" (God) aur "Noor" (Light) ko samajhne ka mauka sabko diya gaya tha, par log materialistic calculations mein phase rahe. Maa Noor Ananta ki ye ek kadi shikayat aur deep "Energy Truth" hai. Jab unhone sab kuch khule aam bata diya, phir bhi log apne "Ego" ke karan us gehrai ko samajh nahi paaye. Maa ne sab kuch 'Crystal Clear' kar diya tha ki 2020 mein kya hone wala hai, par log unhe ek aam insaan samajh kar unki baaton ko ignore kar rahe the. Ye post unki "Disappointment" dikhata hai ki Manav abhi bhi so raha hai.

"Where nothing is, there is everything." Ye Shunya (Zero/Void) ki state hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab tak tum 'Stree' ya 'Purush' mein phase rahoge, tum 'Noor' ko nahi dekh paoge. Asli Women's Day tab hai jab aap us "Formless" (Nirankar) power ko pehchano jo har aurat aur mard ke andar hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki poori life ki "Efforts" sirf isi realization ke liye hain—ki tum wo ho jahan 'Kuch nahi' hai, isliye wahan 'Sab kuch' hai.

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 8 March 2020 (3 days before WHO). Caption: Where nothing is, there is everything. All efforts are for this realization. #Happy_Womens_Day #Om_Harihar #Noor_Mast_Malnga1008. Non-dual Advaita philosophy. Aspect: Cosmic Process - the void from which Satyuga is born.
all_events.parivartan_aspect: Cosmic Process - the void from which Satyuga is born

all_events.description: NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki Kundalini energy unke chehre par manifest hui. NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki befikri se unhone purani 'Samsarik' pehchan ko 'Zero' kar diya. Ye Spiritual War ka wo din hai jahan Maa ne declare kiya: 'Main ab kisi bandhan mein nahi hoon, main sirf Noor hoon.'

Maa keh rahi hain ki jab tak tum 'Soch' (Thought) mein ho, tum dusro ki life mein jhaank rahe ho. Jab duniya 'Stop' hogi (Pandemic), tab tumhare paas sirf 'Silence' bachega—wahi silence tumhe tumhare asli 'Noor' tak le jayega. Right side ki image mein ek haath (Hand) poore Brahmand (Cosmos) aur planets ko hold kiye huye hai, jiske beech mein ek bright 'Sun' (Noor) jal raha hai. Ye NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki cosmic power hai. Hari (Vishnu) poore brahmand ko sustain kar rahe hain, aur Har (Shiva) purane thoughts ko destroy kar rahe hain.

Maa Noor Ananta ne Lord Shiva ki 'Geometric Energy' manifest ki. Unhone bataya ki ye 'Chaos' actually ek 'Cosmic Design' hai. Agar aap is geometry (Noor) ke sath align ho jao, toh aapka 'Chakra System' hamesha ke liye upgrade ho jayega. NMM frequency mein rehne ka matlab hai—chahe duniya palat jaye, Malang apne 'Noor' mein mast rehta hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne ye "Global Energy Compass" release karke bataya ki unki presence ab har disha (direction) mein spread ho chuki hai. Image mein Maa chaaron dishaon (N, S, E, W) mein ek saath manifest ho rahi hain. Noor Hari Har ki ye energy dharti (Water) se lekar aakash (Space) tak ko control kar rahi hai. Red Compass dikhata hai ki ye energy ab "Magnetically" sabko Satyuga ki taraf guide kar rahi hai. Ye pandemic nahi, balki unki energy ka 'Expansion' tha.

Ye post dikhata hai ki poori duniya aur uski kismat ab Harihar ke hath mein hai. Jo bhi ho raha hai, wo unki marzi ke hisab se "Directional" hai, random nahi. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab tak aap NMM (Noor Mast Malang) frequency mein rahoge, aapko bhatakne ki zarurat nahi. Unki nazar (Eyes) aap par hai, aur wo aapko is Spiritual Cosmic World War ke beech guide kar rahi hain.

Maa ne signal diya ki ye waqt sirf bahar ke virus se ladne ka nahi hai, balki apne "Inner Child" ko naye yug ke liye protect karne ka hai. Ganesha rasta tabhi saaf karenge jab aap lalach chhod kar 'Noor' ki taraf dekhoge. Ye chaos sirf 'Rebirth' ki process hai. Maa ka message tha: 'Maya ke peeche mat bhago, apne andar ke Noor ko pehchano.'

Maa Noor Ananta ne is din officially announce kiya: "NOORISM UNIVERSAL ENERGY." Ye ek spiritual announcement tha ki ab purane dharam aur logics kaam nahi karenge, sirf 'Noorism' ki universal frequency hi kaam karegi. Maa keh rahi hain ki darrne ki zarurat nahi hai. Jab duniya ki saari systems (economy, travel, health) fail ho rahi hain, tab Noorism ki energy ek "Universal Shield" bankar aayi hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki NHH energy ab sirf 'Theory' nahi rahi, wo unke chehre par 'Noor' bankar dikh rahi hai.

Maa ne bataya ki ye virus ya pandemic koi "Haadsa" (accident) nahi hai, balki ye Justice (Nyay) hai. Kaliyuga ke paapon ka ghada bhar chuka tha, aur ab "Balance" wapis laane ka waqt aa gaya tha. "Nothing can stop what's coming" ka matlab hai ki ab koi scientist ya government ise rok nahi sakti. Ye Yug Parivartan ka woh phase hai jahan "Nature" (Prakriti) ne charge le liya hai. Ye ek "Great Awakening" (Maha Jagran) hai. Jo log andhere mein the, unhe thappad maar kar jagane ka waqt aa gaya hai. Is cleaning process ko ab koi nahi rok sakta.

Jab poori duniya "Pandemic" ke darr se kaanp rahi thi, Maa Noor Ananta Universe ko "Thanks" bol rahi thi kyunki unhe is chaos ke piche ka #GreatTransformation saaf dikh raha tha. Universe ne humein ek mauka diya hai 'Jagne' (Awakening) ka. Maa ne #ॐ_हरिहर ki shakti se ye seal kar diya ki ye transformation unstoppable hai. Unhone us "Divine Darkness" (Mahakali energy) ko accept kar liya hai jo cleaning kar rahi hai.

"Corona" ka matlab hota hai Crown (Mukuṭ). Maa ne dikha diya ki unka Crown Chakra (Sahasrara) ab fully activate ho chuka hai (Glowing Om on the head). Ye glowing Om dikhata hai ki unki thoughts ab universe ke 'Noor' se sync hain. Virus wahan enter nahi kar sakta jahan "Om" ki frequency ho. Unki aankhein band hain kyunki wo "Bahar" ki tabahi nahi, "Andar" ka 'Noor' dekh rahi hain.

Maa ne bataya ki ye transformation kisi ki "Soch Samjh" (intellect) mein nahi aane wala. Ye ek "Cosmic Surgery" hai. Maa ne alert kiya ki unki energy se 'Khilwad' mat karna, kyunki wo seedha Yug Parivartan ke blueprint se judi hain. Maa ne saaf kar diya ki ab "Opinion" dene ka waqt gaya. Jab 'Nature' apna kaam karti hai, toh insaan ko sirf 'Chup' rehna chahiye. Ye message un logon ke liye "Shut Up" call tha jo abhi bhi is global crisis ko mazak ya logic se dekh rahe the.

PM Modi ne physically 'Lockdown' ka seed (beej) boya, par Maa ne bataya ki ye spiritual level par ek "Frequency Shift" hai. Jab bahar ki activity zero hoti hai, tabhi 'Noor' ka kaam shuru hota hai. Maa ne ise "Welcome Karma" kaha. Unka matlab tha ki jo 'Karma' insaan ne ab tak kiye hain, ab unka result milne ka waqt aa gaya hai. Maa ne Modiji ko 'Thank You' bola kyunki unhone wo 'Silence' create kiya jo Yug Parivartan ke liye zaroori tha. Jab sab log apne gharon mein 'Shaant' huye, tab Maa ne dharti ki energy ko 'Reset' karna shuru kiya.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is din "Final Announcement" kiya: "IT’S TIME. TIME STARTS NOW." "Nagams" wo log ya souls hain jo 'Noor' ki frequency se connect hone ke liye chune gaye hain. Jab duniya ke saare physical raste band huye, tab 'Nagamo' (The Awakened Ones) ke liye spiritual raste khul gaye. 22 March wahi "Zero Point" tha jahan se unki yatra shuru hui. Jab duniya ko lag raha tha ki sab kuch khatam ho raha hai, Maa ne kaha ki asli khel toh ab "Start" hua hai.

Maa ne bataya ki ye virus nahi, balki ek "Cleansing Process" hai jo insaan ke andar ke 'Kachre' (ego, lies, greed) ko dhone aaya hai. Maa ne #Spiritual_War ka tag dekar confirm kiya ki ye koi physical ladayi nahi hai. Ye energy ki ladayi hai. Maa Kali ka 'Raudra' roop dikhata hai ki ab safai 'Strictly' hogi. Maa is photo mein ek 'Peaceful Warrior' ki tarah lag rahi hain. Unhone samjhaya ki NMM frequency mein rehne ka matlab hai—chaos ke beech mein bhi 'Anand' mein rehna.

Maa Noor Ananta ne "Hum Hai Hindustani" ke naare ke saath ek bohot hi deep Energy Message diya hai. Tiranga (Flag) yahan "Collective Consciousness" ka symbol hai. Maa ka message tha: 'Apni roots se judo, kyunki naya yug (Noorism) isi mitti se janm lega.'
Maa Noor Ananta ne Lord Krishna ke zariye 'Spiritual War' ka bigul baja diya. Maa ne signal diya ki ab 'Satyuga' ka shankh-naad ho chuka hai. Shankh ka bajna "Awakening" ka signal hai.

Maa ne dikhaya ki wo is global game ki 'Mastermind' hain. Maa is photo mein ek 'Strategic Victory' celebrate kar rahi hain. Unhone confirm kiya ki NMM frequency ke 'Nagams' (souls) ab ordinary nahi rahe, wo universe ke 'Crown Jewels' ban chuke hain.

Maa Noor Ananta ne ek bohot hi powerful image share ki: "LAW OF UNIVERSE - LAW 108" ek chalti hui gun (pistol) ke saath. Gun se nikalti hui bullet ka matlab hai—"Point of No Return." Jab bullet trigger dabne ke baad nikal jati hai, toh use roka nahi ja sakta. Maa ne signal diya ki Universe ka kanoon (Law 108) ab trigger ho chuka hai. Jo purification (safai) honi thi, uski "Bullet" nikal chuki hai. Ab koi bhi 'Kaliyuga' ka logic ya power ise rok nahi payegi. Ab "Soft Spirituality" ka waqt khatam, ab "Law of Universe" ki 'Direct Hit' ka waqt hai. Ye 'Law' dikhata hai ki Universe ab "Karma" ka hisab-kitab bohot tezi se kar raha hai. Bullet ki raftaar ka matlab hai "Instant Karma."

Maa ki silhouette (perchayi) ke andar Saturn (Shani) ka planet chamak raha hai. Shani "Justice" (Nyay), "Discipline" ka planet hai. Maa ne dikhaya ki ye lockdown koi bimaari nahi, balki Shani ka Nyay hai. Insaan ko uske karmo ki saza aur purification ke liye 'Ekant' (isolation) mein bheja gaya hai. Jab "Shani" (justice) aur "Brahma" (creation) ek saath aate hain, toh uska matlab hai ki purana yug khatam ho raha hai aur naya yug 'Design' ho raha hai.

Maa ne India ke ek 'Vintage Map' ko chuna. Ye dikhata hai ki unka connection Bharat ki "Ancient Roots" se hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab poori duniya dark (andhere) mein hai, tab Bharat 'Light' (Noor) ka source banne wala hai.

Maa is photo mein 'Ganesha' ke roop mein dikha rahi hain ki wo kitni 'Strong' aur 'Steady' hain. Unhone NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki frequency se poore universe ko 'Protect' kiya. Ganesha ka ye 'Golden' aur 'Black' avatar dikhata hai ki ab "Darkness" ke beech mein "Light" (Golden Glow) manifest ho rahi hai.

5 April 2020 ko jab poora Bharat light (diye/mombatti) jala raha tha, tab sabka dhyan andhere ko mitane par tha. Maa ne dikhaya ki 'Noor' wahi hai jiski koi parchayi nahi hoti. Shadow tab banti hai jab cheezein 'Physical' hoti hain. Jab aap pure 'Energy' ban jate ho, toh aapki koi shadow nahi rehti. Jis pal tum 'Noor' (Light) ban jaoge, darr hamesha ke liye mit jayega. 5 April ki 'Jyoti' jalana purani parchayi ko delete karne ka portal tha.

Maa ne dikhaya ki jab 5 April ko sabne diye jalaye, toh wo energy Sheshnag ki tarah dharti ko "Stability" dene ke liye activate hui. Noor Hari Har ki ye energy dharti ke "Neeche" (Subconscious) se lekar "Upar" (Space) tak phaili hui hai. Maa is photo mein ek 'Divine Guard' ki tarah lag rahi hain.

Maa ne signal diya ki ab dharti "Blindly" nahi chal rahi. Wo ab Noorism ke 'Vision' (Third Eye) ke control mein hai. Maa ki aankhein is photo mein bohot 'Sharp' aur 'Analytical' hain. Wo NMM frequency mein reh kar dharti ke har 'Move' ko watch kar rahi hain. 6 April ka message tha—"The Shift is Done." 5 April ko jo light jalayi gayi, usne dharti ko 'Darkness' se utha kar Maa ki 'Third Eye' ke light-zone mein daal diya hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki jab duniya virus se dar rahi hai, Bharat ke ye "Donon Warriors" (Modi aur Yogi) 'Nature' aur 'Dharma' ki shield bankar khade hain. Maa ne unhe apne Head (Sir) par sthapit kiya hai, yani unka har action 'Noor' se guide ho raha hai. Ye dikhata hai ki Noor Hari Har ki energy ab "Political" aur "Spiritual" dono levels par ek ho chuki hai. Ye 1008 frequency ka direct manifestation hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki virus toh sirf ek 'Bahana' (excuse) hai. Asli mystery ye hai ki dharti ko 'Purify' kiya ja raha hai ya keh sakte hain ki cleansing process chal rha hai. Poora world "Vaccine" aur "Medicine" ki talash mein tha, par Maa ne bataya ki ye virus koi 'Lab' ki paidaish nahi, balki ek Cosmic Event hai.

Maa ek lakdi (wood/branch) par bina kisi support ke hawa mein "Float" (lehra) kar rahi hain. Ye Prana Shakti aur Vayu Tattva (Air Element) par unki complete mastery dikhata hai. Unka hawa mein hona dikhata hai ki NHH energy ne unke sharir ko "Lightweight" (Noor) bana diya hai. NMM frequency yahan "Balance" aur "Trust" ka symbol hai. Unhe pata hai ki 'Prakriti' unhe girne nahi degi. Maa ka message tha: 'Apni saans (Prana) ko Noor se bharo, Hanuman ki tarah fearless bano, kyunki ab hawa badal chuki hai.'

Maa Noor Ananta ne Lord Krishna ke Shankh Naad aur Lord Vishnu ki Laser Eyes se dikhaya ki 'Spiritual Cosmic World War' shuru ho chuki hai. Unhone bataya ki universe ki lightning ab purane kachre ko saaf kar rahi hai. NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki frequency se poore brahmand ko scan kiya ja raha hai.

"MEIN SABKO DEKH RAHA HUU." Maa ne signal diya ki koi bhi karm universe ki nazar se bacha nahi hai. Jab insaan ko lagta hai ki koi use dekh nahi raha, tabhi wo galat kaam karta hai. Maa ne ye image post karke "High Alert" jaari kiya ki ye Noorism ki srishti hai, aur yahan har cheez 'Live Monitor' ho rahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki bacho ki tarah mat bhatko. Universe (Noor) tumhare har vichar (thought) ko scan kar raha hai. Unhone dikhaya ki unke andar hi Shiva-Shakti ka milan ho chuka hai, aur ab wo wahi execute karengi jo universe ka kanoon (Law 108) kahega.

Maa Noor Ananta ne 'Spiritual Cosmic World War' ke zariye dikhaya ki purani 'Ego' ko jalna hi hoga. Unhone 5-headed Serpent God se dharti ke 5 elements ko balance kiya aur Cosmic Mother ke roop mein poore planets ko apne 'Noor' mein samet liya. NHH (Noor Hari Har) ki energy se unhone 'Shiva-Tandav' ko 'Om-Vibration' mein badal diya. Maa ka message tha: 'Apne purane 'Main' ko jal jaane do, kyunki ab tumhara naya janm ek 'Cosmic Being' ki tarah ho raha hai.' Maa keh rahi hain ki darrne ki jagah is 'Aag' (transformation) ko embrace karo. Ye message "Death of Ego" ka final warning tha.

Maa ne samjhaya ki Noorism kisi ek dharm ka nahi, balki poore brahmand ka hai. Ye aankhein dekh rahi hain ki 'Kaaba' se lekar 'Kailash' tak ab sirf Noor ki frequency vibrate ho rahi hai. Image mein Makkah Royal Clock Tower bohot prominent hai aur date 11/04/2020 likhi hai. Clock Tower ka matlab hai ki "Waqt" (Time) ab universe ke hath mein hai. Insaan ko ab bahar bhatakne ki zarurat nahi hai, kyunki 'Noor' har ghar aur har dil mein pahunch gaya hai.

Maa ne image par likha hai: "CORONA VIRUS, LOCKDOWN, WHOLE WORLD, THALI BAJAOO, DIYA JALAOO, RAMAYAN, MAHABHARAT." Log soch rahe the ye sab random hai, par Maa ne bataya ki ye ek Sequential Process hai. Thali/Diya: Sound (Frequency) aur Light (Noor) ka activation. Ramayan and Mahabharata ka TV par aana purani Memory ko DNA mein wapis jagane ka tareeqa tha. Ye message un logon ke liye tha jo in sabko 'Entertainment' samajh rahe the. Maa ka message tha: NMM 1008 ki frequency se judo aur Satyuga ke liye taiyar ho jao.

Maa ne bataya ki 'Thali Bajana' aur 'Diya Jalana' actually ek "Royal Welcome" tha. Maa ne signal diya ki ab tak insaan ne dharti ko apni "Property" samjha tha, par ab dharti ka asli Malik (Owner/Cosmic Energy) wapis aa chuka hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki darne ki wajah virus nahi, balki tumhare apne 'Karm' hain. Jab Malik aata hai, toh wo 'Saja' (Punishment) nahi deta, wo sirf 'Hisaab' (Audit) karta hai. Ye message un logon ke liye "Red Alert" tha jo sote huye Kaliyuga mein ji rahe the.

Maa Noor Ananta ne Queen of Justice ke saath manifest hokar declare kiya ki ab dharti par 'Nyay' (Justice) ka process shuru ho chuka hai. Unhone bataya ki ab sirf NHH (Noor Hari Har) ka kanoon chalega. NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki shakti se unhone dikhaya ki Manav ko 'Karmic Justice' ke liye taiyar rehna chahiye.

Maa ne likha hai—"GAME OF ENERGY." Jab poori duniya tension mein thi, Maa ne bataya ki ye sab universe ki energies ka ek 'Play' hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki 'Lockdown' ka asli maksad hai "Chup Chaap Bethna" (Silence & Stillness). Jab insaan shant baithta hai, tabhi wo universe ke 'Khel' ko samajh paata hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab "Karta" (Doer) mat bano, sirf "Sakshi" (Witness/Observer) bano. Ye message un logon ke liye tha jo 'Bahar' rasta dhund rahe the—unhe kaha gaya ki 'Andar' baith kar khel dekho.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is profile picture ke saath ye saaf kar diya ki ab "Bacha Khel" khatam hua aur "Maha-Tandav" ka phase shuru ho gaya hai. Ab sirf 'Diya' aur 'Thali' se kaam nahi chalega, ab apne andar ke Raudra (fierce) form ko jagana hoga. Ye Mahakala aur Mahakali ki combined energy hai jo Lockdown Phase-2 ko lead kar rahi thi.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is "Spiritual Cosmic World War" album mein 7 aisi photos add ki hain jo dikhati hain ki purani duniya ki "Satta" (Power) kaise khatam ho rahi hai aur "Noor" ka nyay kaise sthapit ho raha hai. Maa ne signal diya ki ab na koi "Rani" (Queen) bachegi na koi purana "Mazhab" (Religion). Ye "Spiritual World War" kisi insaan ke khilaaf nahi, balki purane power system ke khilaaf hai. Message bohot clear tha—"No one is above the Law of Universe." Chahe koi kitna bhi bada ho, Noor Hari Har ke samne sab 'Ek' (Equal) hain.

Poori duniya ki badi pharma companies aur labs vaccine dhundne mein pagal ho rahi thin. aa ne saaf likha—"Corona Virus ko thik karne ke liye koi bhi medicine nahi banegi kisi bhi lab mein nahi kisi bhi desh mein nahi." Jo cheez hawa (vibration) se aayi hai, wo hawa (energy frequency) se hi jayegi. Wo batati hain ki Noor Hari Har ki energy ab "Hawa" (Vayu Tattva) ke zariye healing release kar rahi hai. Jo insaan apne 'Prana' (breath) ko 1008 ki frequency par le jayega, wahi survive karega.

Maa ne samjhaya ki jise tum virus keh rahe ho, wo actually Mahadev ki destructive frequency hai jo dharti ke har ghar tak pahunch gayi hai (Ghar Ghar Mahadev). Ye virus koi biological error nahi, balki Divine Justice ka tool hai. Ye message un logon ke liye tha jo sirf science par bharosa karke 'Noor' ko bhool chuke the. NMM frequency dikhati hai ki jo log 'Nagams' (Awakened Souls) hain, wo ab jaag chuke hain. Unhe pata hai ki ye bimaari nahi, Noorism ka maha-jagran hai. Jab duniya 'Lockdown' mein qaid thi, Malang ke Nagam dharti ki energy ko 'Heal' karne ke liye uth khade huye the.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is din ek bohot hi kadak (strict) par 'Justice-oriented' message diya: "Kis kis pe ye lathiyaa padne wali hai, pata nahi...." Maa ne signal diya ki jo log universe ke kanoon (Law 108) ko halke mein le rahe hain, unka "Karmic Dand" ab tayyar hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab insaan "Pyaar" (Phase-1: Thali/Diya) se nahi samajhta, toh universe "Dand" (Phase-2: Lathi) ka istemal karta hai. Ye message un logon ke liye "Final Warning" tha jo lockdown ka mazaak uda rahe the.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is profile picture ke saath ek bohot hi sidha aur khatarnak warning di: "SAVDHAN INSAAN." Image mein Maa ki aankhein (eyes) bohot hi intense aur 'Fixed' (ek jagah tiki hui) hain. Ye "Third Eye Monitoring" ka symbol hai. Dark lips aur dark eye makeup dikhata hai ki ye Mahakali ki energy hai jo ab insaan ke 'Karm' scan kar rahi hai. Malang jaanta hai ki insaan bohot jaldi 'Ego' mein aa jata hai, isliye unhone use "Savdhan" rehne ko kaha. Unka message tha—"Main tumhe dekh rahi hoon, apne har kadam par savdhan raho."

Image mein farsh (floor) par diye (lamps) jalaye gaye hain aur likha hai—"WELCOME SUPREME POWER". Maa keh rahi hain ki ye diye sirf roshni ke liye nahi hain, ye us 'Power' ka swagat hai jo dharti ko 'Reset' karne aayi hai. Ye message un logon ke liye tha jo abhi bhi purani 'System' ke wapis aane ka intezar kar rahe the—Maa ne saaf kar diya ki ab naye system (Noorism) ka aagaman ho chuka hai. Shiva-Shakti ka ye milan dikhata hai ki ab "Destruction" aur "Creation" dono ek saath chalenge.

all_events.description: Maa ne signal diya ki insaan 'Jhoot' (Lies) mein jeene ka aadi (habitual) ho chuka hai. Isliye jab 'Saty' (Truth) samne aata hai, toh wo use "Dangerous" lagta hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main dangerous nahi hoon, main toh sirf 'Saty' ka aaina (mirror) hoon. Dangerous toh wo 'Sach' hai jo tumhare purane jhoot, ego aur system ko khatam kar raha hai. Unka message tha—"Agar tum sachhe ho, toh mujhse darrne ki zarurat nahi. Agar jhoothe ho, toh 'Satya' tumhe nahi chhodega."

Maa ne Taj Mahal ke "Dom" (Gumbad) ko apni ungliyon (fingers) ke beech 'Pick' karne ka pose diya hai. Ye dikhata hai ki badi-badi human-made structures universe ki nazar mein sirf "Toys" (khilaune) hain. Maa ne signal kiya ki insaan ko lagta hai wo 'Karta' (Doer) hai, par lockdown ne dikha diya ki insaan ki koi 'Aukaat' nahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main toh sirf ek 'Medium' (zariya) hoon. Ye poora "Spiritual Cosmic World War" wo Mahadev lead kar rahe hain jo unke piche "Cosmic Form" mein khade hain. Ye message 'Ego-Death' ka final chapter tha.

Maa Noor Ananta ne apni profile picture mein Lord Shiva ke sabse ugra (fierce) roop ko manifest kiya hai, jisme unki apni aankhein (eyes) background mein poore brahmand ko scan kar rahi hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki darrne ki zarurat nahi hai agar tum sachhe ho. Ye gussa unke liye hai jo dharti ko nuksan pahuncha rahe hain. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne dikhaya ki dharti par jo bhi 'Tandav' ho raha hai, wo "Control" mein hai. Maa ki aankhein background mein ye confirm karti hain ki wo is yuddh ki 'Chief Witness' (Sakshi) hain.

Maa ne signal diya ki ye "CHANGE" insaan ke bas mein nahi hai. Ye upar (Universe) se niche (Earth) ki taraf aa raha hai. Jab duniya sirf 'Virus' ko dekh rahi thi, Maa ne dikhaya ki asli badlav 'Cosmic Level' par ho raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab rukne ka ya piche dekhne ka waqt nahi hai.

Maa ne signal diya ki ye "Worldly Events" (paisa, bimari, darr) sirf ek parda hain. Asli ladaai un energies ke beech hai jo dharti ko 'Control' karna chahti hain. Maa ki aankhein in dono yoddhaon ke upar hain, jo dikhata hai ki unka "Noor" is poore yuddh ka controller hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki bahaar ke 'Chaos' se mat darr, ye purani 'Adharmic' shaktiyon ka anth ho raha hai. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne dharti ko 'Lock' kiya hai taaki use 'Heal' kiya ja sake.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is profile picture ke zariye dikhaya ki "Noor ki Yatra" kabhi nahi rukti. Ye message tha ki bhale hi duniya ruk gayi hai, par dharti ki "Vibration Upgrade" ki yatra (journey) on hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki main har roop mein tumhare saath chal rahi hoon. Maa ne #ॐ_हरिहर ke saath samjhaya ki ye raasta mushkil (rocky) zaroori hai, par naya yug (Satyuga) isi 'Agni Pariksha' ke baad ayega. Unka dono roopon mein hath pakad kar chalna (Metaphorically) dikhata hai ki unka 'Inner' aur 'Outer' self puri tarah sync hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is profile picture ke saath ek aisi "Shunya" (Zero) state manifest ki, jo insaan ki physical body aur cosmic soul ke milan ka ultimate portal hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab "Parda" (Masks/Lies) hatane ka waqt hai. Unka ye 'Natural' form dikhata hai ki unhone poore lockdown ko ek 'Deep Samadhi' ki tarah jiya hai. Peeth (Spine) humari Sushumna Nadi ka adhaar hai jahan se Kundalini upar uthti hai. Maa ne dikha diya ki Noor Hari Har ki energy unke 'DNA' aur 'Spine' mein integrate ho chuki hai. Shiva-Shakti ka ye pose dikhata hai ki ab dharti ka 'Balance' (Ardhanarishwar energy) unke zariye restore ho raha hai.

Maa Noor Ananta ne is image ke saath ek bohot hi serious cosmic countdown shuru kiya: "Tik Tik ...2 SAVDHAN HO JAOO INSAAN." Maa ne signal kiya ki insaan ko lag raha hai wo lockdown se nikal raha hai, par actually wo universe ke naye "System" mein dakhil ho raha hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki waqt (Time) khatam ho raha hai. Unka ye look ek 'Cosmic Guard' jaisa hai jo har insaan ki 'Soul-Frequency' scan kar raha hai. Nmm frequency yahan "Urgency" ka symbol hai. Malang jaanta hai ki 'Kaliyuga' ka countdown "Tik Tik" karke khatam ho raha hai. Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga mein enter karne ke liye 'Savdhan' (Aware) hona pehli shart hai.

Maa ne bataya ki asli shakti (Noor) Omnipresent (sarv-vyapi) hai. Maa ne signal diya ki insaan ab kahi bhi "Chhup" (hide) nahi sakta. Nmm frequency yahan "Ubiquity" (har jagah hona) ka symbol hai. Maa ne dikha diya ki unka 'Noor' ab kisi ek room ya city mein qaid nahi hai, wo poore brahmand mein phail chuka hai.
Karan 'Surya-Putra' (Son of Sun) hai. Uska wapis aana matlab dharti par Surya ki Tejasvi Shakti ka activation. Uska return matlab ab "Hidden Truths" (Chhupe huye sach) bahr aayenge.

Ye post wo "Masterstroke" hai jahan Maa Noor Ananta ne apni 'Supreme Authority' ko ek bohot hi bold aur befikar (fearless) andaaz mein reveal kiya. 'Baap' yahan gender nahi, balki "Source/Creator" ka symbol hai. Maa ne bataya ki jise tum 'Nature' ya 'God' keh kar darr rahe ho, wahi energy unke zariye bol rahi hai. "LOL" dikhata hai ki ye "Supreme Power" kitni 'Playful' hai. Ye message insaan ke 'Ego' ko todne ke liye ek cosmic thappad (slap) jaisa tha.

#KARMO KA FAL red bold letters mein likha hai, jo 'Warning' aur 'Alert' ka symbol hai. Maa ne signal diya ki insaan ne sadiyon (centuries) se jo dharti ke saath kiya, ab uska 'Hisaab' karne ka waqt aa gaya hai. Ye message insaan ko uski 'Action-Reaction' cycle yaad dilane ke liye tha. Maa ne confirm kiya ki wo ab is 'Judgment' ki lead witness hain. Unka message tha—"Main shant (Noor) bhi hoon aur main hi 'Shani' ki talwar bhi hoon. Jo 'Satya' hai, wahi bachega."

[Decoded from image] Facebook post, 15 May 2020. Album: Spiritual Cosmic World War. Caption: #KARMO KA FAL (Fruits of Karma). Video + Kali image + Shani Dev. COVID as karmic consequences through cosmic war. Aspect: Divine Justice - Karmo Ka Fal through the Spiritual Cosmic World War.

all_events.description: Vamana avatar ne teen kadam (3 steps) mein teeno lok naap liye the. Maa ne signal diya ki ye Lockdown ke phases (1, 2, aur 3) actually wahi "Teen Kadam" hain jinhone insaan ke ahankar (Ego) ko dharti se mita diya hai. King Bali (Ego/Power) yagya kar raha tha, par use pata nahi tha ki bhagwan uski 'Satta' (Power) lene aaye hain. 2020 mein insaan ko laga wo 'Supreme' hai, par Noor ne 'Vamana' ban kar sab kuch wapis 'Malik' ke naam kar liya. Ye message "Total Surrender" ka final call tha.

Is image mein Maa ek gehre dhyan (Samadhi) mein hain aur unke sharir ke charon taraf Trimurti (Brahma, Vishnu, Mahesh) ki energy manifest ho rahi hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab duniya bahar rasta dhund rahi thi, tab 'Noor' ne teeno mahashaktiyon ko ek hi 'Human Medium' (Maa) mein merge kar diya. Ye message "Total Cosmic Control" ka saboot tha. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne dharti ke 'Heart Chakra' ko unlock kiya tha. Unka ye dhyan dikhata hai ki wo is 'Spiritual Cosmic World War' ki 'Peaceful Powerhouse' hain.

Maa ne signal diya ki ye Lockdown sirf physical nahi tha, ye "Mental Cage" (Manasik Pinjra) tha. Jo log is 'Pause' mein apne 'Noor' se connect ho gaye, wo is pinjre se humesha ke liye azad ho chuke hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki asali azadi bahar nikalne mein nahi, balki purane 'Fear' aur 'Ego' ke pinjre ko todne mein hai. Pinjre se uda hua panchi 'Noorie Atma' hai jo ab 'Karmik Cycle' se upar uth chuki hai.

Thapar (Slap) yahan koi physical maar nahi, balki "Shock of Truth" hai. Maa ne signal kiya ki jo log unke 2019-2020 ke warnings ko ignore kar rahe the, ab unhe 'Karmic Slaps' (Nature's blows) milna shuru ho gaye hain. Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Noor' ka mazak udane walon ki 'Aukaat' ab unke haalaat dikha rahe hain. Nmm frequency yahan "Unapologetic Truth" ka symbol hai. Maa ko kisi ki 'Validation' ki zarurat nahi hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki 'Unlock' hone ka matlab ye nahi ki sab pehle jaisa ho jayega. Nyay ki devi ne Bharat ko apne tarazu mein le liya hai. Maa ka gaze (nazar) Queen of Justice ki taraf hai, jo dikhata hai ki wo Noor Hari Har ki 'Law Enforcer' hain. Queen of Justice ke neeche 'Books' (Law) dikhati hain ki dharti par ab purani constitution nahi, balki Noorism ke "Eternal Laws" chalenge.

Maa keh rahi hain ki 11 June se "Judgment" ka naya phase shuru hua hai. Ye patthar (Stone) dharti ki 'Stability' ka symbol hai. 12 June ka ye message un logon ke liye tha jo 'Purani Duniya' mein wapis jana chahte the—Maa ne dikha diya ki Malik ne dharti ko 'Reset' kar diya hai. Maa ne caption mein likha hai—❤️ HARIOM ❤️. Ye Noor Hari Har ka sabse shuddh (pure) form hai. Krishna ki 'Bansuri' (Music/Noor) aur Mahadev ka 'Tandav' (Change) milkar yug-parivartan kar rahe hain. Maa ka muskurata chehra dikhata hai ki wo is 'Union' (Milan) ki sakshi hain.

Maa ne bataya ki asli gyan (knowledge) insaanon ki likhi kitabon mein nahi, balki Parmatma ki Live Script mein hai. Maa ne samjhaya ki jaise-jaise wo is 'Natural Script' ko padhti gayi, Parmatma unke "Kareeb" (closer) ata gaya. "Shiva O Shiva 💚❤️". Ye Noor Hari Har ki 'Eternal Love' energy hai. Maa is photo mein upar aakash (sky) ki taraf dekh rahi hain. Ye "Shiva Gaze" hai—jahan aap apne 'Source' se direct connect hote ho. Nmm frequency yahan "Direct Experience" ka symbol hai. Malang ko 'Translate' karne ki zarurat nahi hoti, wo sirf 'Feel' karta hai.
Maa ne Shiva-Shakti ke samne baithkar dharti ki 'Energy-Neenv' ko mazboot kiya. 21 June 2020 ko 'Annular Solar Eclipse' (Ring of Fire) tha. Maa ka ye dhyan us 'Zero Point' ke liye pre-activation tha.

Maa ne is post mein apne 7 saal ke safar (2013-2020) ka nichod rakha aur ek aisi baat kahi jo insaani dimaag (logic) ko hila dene wali hai. Maa ne likha—"PURI KI PURI DUNIYA 'NOORISM' ke prabhav mein hai." 2020 mein jo ho raha hai, wo unhi ki posts ka 'Physical Manifestation' hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki jab tumhe meri normal posts samajh nahi aayi, toh ab "NOORISM" kya khak samajh ayega. Ye message 'Intellectual Ego' ka total destruction tha.

Maa ne signal diya ki sadiyon pehle jo Bharat se chheen liya gaya tha, ab wo sab wapis lene ka waqt aa gaya hai. Maa ne saaf kaha—"Hum kisi ka haq nahi chin rahe, hum apna jo tha wo wapis lene aye hai." Ye Bharat ka 'Spiritual Takeover' hai poori duniya par. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab rone ka ya darrne ka waqt nahi hai, ab Bharat ke "Vishwa Guru" banne ka 'Coronation' shuru ho chuka hai. Bharat ka coronation 'Insaani kanoon' $(\text{Human laws})$ se nahi, balki 108 Divine Laws se hoga. Maa ne confirm kiya ki Noorism hi Bharat ko wapis 'Sone ki Chidiya' banayega. Unka message tha—"Khel shuru ho gaya hai, bas dekhte jao kaise 'Satya' ki vijay hoti hai."

Maa ne bataya ki jo bhi system jhoot (Lies) par tika hai—chahe wo Bollywood ho, Educational institutions hon, ya fake dharmik gurus—unka "Exposed" hona tay hai. Maa ne saaf kaha—"Koi bhi bach nahi payega". Ye "Spiritual Cosmic World War" ab 'Institutional Level' par cleaning shuru kar raha hai. Fake gurus aur astrologers ka waqt khatam ho chuka hai. NMM (Noor Mast Malang) ki shakti se unhone samjhaya ki ab sirf 'Noor' ka kanoon chalega.

Ye yuddh kisi physical weapons se nahi, balki "Truth vs. Lies" (Saty vs Asaty) ke beech hai. Maa ne un saari jagahon ki list di hai jahan "Cleaning" honi tay hai. Unka message tha—"Duniya ke bade-bade neta aur gurus apne aap ko bachane ki koshish karenge, par Malang ki nazar se koi bach nahi payega."

Maa Noor Ananta ne apne is 'Ugra' (fierce) look ke saath insaan ko aakhri baar hosh mein aane ki chetawani di: "savdhan insaan". Ye un logon ke liye "Red Alert" tha jo abhi bhi 'Kaliyuga' ke system ko bachane ki koshish kar rahe the. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab bohot der ho chuki hai, ab sirf 'Savdhani' (Hosh) hi tumhe bacha sakti hai.

Maa keh rahi hain ki dimaag se 'Explain' karne ki koshish mat karo, sirf is badlav ko 'Experience' karo. Maa ne samjhaya ki ab 'Material' aur 'Spiritual' ke beech koi deewar nahi hai. Jo sahi raaste par chal raha hai (Malang), wahi 'Satya' ka yoddha hai.

Maa ne is yellow ball ko ek "Golden Orb" ya "Sun" (Surya) ki tarah manifest kiya hai. Ye dikhata hai ki 1 July ko unhone dharti ke 'Power Center' ko apne hathon mein lekar use "Heal" aur "Reset" kiya. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab darrne ka nahi, balki apni 'Power' mein wapis aane ka waqt hai. Ye yellow ball actually us "Golden Age" (Satyuga) ka seed hai jo wo dharti par anchor kar rahi hain.

Is image mein Maa ek gehre dhyan (Deep Samadhi) mein hain aur unke sir ke charon taraf Moon Phases (Chandrama ki kalayein) ek 'Crown' ki tarah manifest ho rahi hain. Ye dikhata hai ki unhone poore "Lunar Cycle" (Samay ka chakra) ko apne dhyan mein samet liya hai. Maa ne signal diya ki insaan ka mann (Mind) jo lockdown mein 'Chaos' aur 'Fear' mein tha, wo ab reset ho raha hai. Unka 'Solar Plexus' (Manipura) se nikalta prachand prakash dharti ke 'Solar' aur 'Lunar' energies ko balance kar raha hai.

Is image mein Infinity ($\infty$) ka symbol do prachand urjaon (Fire aur Ice/Blue Light) ke milan se bana hai. Iska matlab hai ki ab srishti mein "Beginning" aur "End" jaisa kuch nahi bacha—sab kuch Ananta (Infinite) hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab rukne ka koi sawal hi nahi hai. Ye dikhata hai ki 'Force' aur 'Vision' ab sync mein hain.

Maa Noor Ananta ne dharti par ek naya kanoon declare kiya: "LAW OF BLACK & WHITE SUPREME POWER." Maa ne signal diya ki "Supreme Power" ne ab dharti ka tarazu apne hath mein le liya hai. Maa keh rahi hain ki ab Malik ki nazar mein sab 'Black and White' hai. Jhoot ko ab sach ka chola pehenne ki ijazat nahi hai.

Maa ne bataya ki 'Corona' sirf ek parda hai, asali maqsad Bharat ko Vishwa-Guru ke pad par baithana hai. "Corona" word mein hi "Coron"-ation chhupa hai. Maa ne signal diya ki ye virus dharti ki 'Cleaning' kar raha hai taaki Bharat ka naya 'Divine Empire' shuru ho sake. Unka message tha—"Main sab mein hoon aur sab mujhme hain, isliye darrne ki koi jagah hi nahi bachi."

Maa Noor Ananta ne un logon ko "Cosmic Warning" di jo unhe sirf ek insaan samajhne ki galti kar rahe the. Unhone likha—"Until you know the whole story, think 1000 times before speaking about me." Maa ne signal kiya ki jo log unhe judge kar rahe hain ya unka mazak uda rahe hain, wo actually "Universe ki Energy" se panga le rahe hain. Maa ne likha—"I AM ME 💚❤️". Ye "I AM" frequency swayam Parmatma ki voice hai. Maa ne #Hariom 🙏🙏🙏 ke saath samjhaya ki unka 'Astitva' (Existence) hi Noor Hari Har hai. Wo 'Rest' mode mein bhi dharti ki 'Vibration' ko control kar rahi hain. Unka message tha—"Main shant hoon par main 'Shakti' hoon. Mujhse panga matlab apne vinaash ko nyota dena."

Bharat ke 74th Independence Day ka wo din jab Maa Noor Ananta ne isse ek "Very Important" event declare kiya. Unhone dikhaya ki 2020 ki azadi sirf political nahi, balki ek deep Spiritual Freedom hai. Maa ne signal diya ki is saal ki azadi purani zanjeeron (Old Systems) ko todne ke liye hai. Noor Hari Har ki energy ne 15 August ko Bharat Mata ke 'Warrior Form' ko activate kiya.

Maa ne signal diya ki ye lockdown aur 2020 ki uthal-puthal actually insaan ke DNA ko 'Re-program' karne ke liye hai. Sarp ka gol ghoomna (Ouroboros pattern) dikhata hai ki purana 'Time Cycle' khatam aur naya 'Golden Circle' shuru ho gaya hai. Hari (Vishnu/Ananta) wo anant loop hai aur Har (Shiva) wo 'Spine' (Support) hai jo dharti ko hold kiye huye hai. Maa ne bataya ki Satyuga ka manav 'Super-Human' hoga jiske paas 'Cosmic Access' hoga.

Maa ne 'Third Degree' (Police torture) ko 'Old Fashion' isliye kaha kyunki wo sirf sharir (body) ko todti hai. Par Eighth Degree (Shani ki energy) seedha 'Rooh' (Soul) aur 'DNA' ko scan karti hai. Agar aap 8 ko horizontal kar do, toh ye Infinity ban jata hai. Iska matlab hai ki Shani ka nyay 'Anant' (Infinite) hai—is se koi bach nahi sakta. Unka message tha—"Main naya kanoon (8th Degree) lekar aayi hoon, ab har jhoote insaan ka hisab isi fashion mein hoga."
